## Spec 120 ‚Äî Unify purchase recording into PO creation ‚Äî SHIPPED 2026-06-16

**What:** operator ‚Äî "replace ý∏öý∏±ý∏ôý∏óý∏∂ý∏Åý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ with the new PO creation." Two purchase paths had diverged
(spec-33 per-ticket `record_purchase` form vs the spec-116/119 PO flow); PO is the better-built one, so
it becomes the single path. SHIPPED (migration `20260701000300` applied to prod under the gate; 874 unit
/ 1076 pgTAP / lint / typecheck / build).

- **Single-ticket = a one-line PO.** On an approved request the inline record form ‚Üí a **"ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏á PO"
  button that opens the create-PO sheet pre-seeded with that one ticket** (one tap, no grid hunting; VAT/
  supplier/ETA/price/order_ref all ride along). Detail page: `CreatePoFromRequestButton` (new client; the
  server page passes the serializable line + suppliers). Procurement drawer: the `record` action ‚Üí a
  button that closes the drawer, seeds the basket with that record, opens the grid's existing sheet (an
  `onCreatePo` callback threaded RecordReviewDrawer ‚Üí DrawerBody; `suppliers` dropped from that chain).
- **order_ref carried.** Migration DROP+CREATE `create_purchase_order` `+p_order_ref` (‚â§80, one per PO,
  written onto each member's existing `purchase_requests.order_ref` ‚Äî NO new column). Sheet gains an
  optional order-ref field; action passes `p_order_ref`. (4th create_purchase_order revision today ‚Äî
  000100 ‚Üí +vat 000200 ‚Üí +order_ref 000300; each DROP+CREATE reproduces the prior body verbatim.)
- **`PurchaseRecordForm` retired from the UI** (both usages gone); the component file + the
  `record_purchase` RPC LEFT in place (AppSheet doesn't call the RPC; removal is a later cleanup).
  `SupplierOption` still lives in `purchase-record-form.tsx` as a type-only import.

**Gate honored:** local-green ‚Üí "Apply now" ‚Üí db:push ‚Üí db:types reconcile (IDENTICAL ‚Äî hand-extension
exact) ‚Üí db:test 1076/0 ‚Üí commit + push. pgTAP file 49: order_ref stored + the sig pins (now
`(uuid,date,jsonb,numeric,text)`). Sheet test: order_ref in the payload.

**SESSION TOTAL (2026-06-16, EIGHT units, 5 prod migrations): 115 PO data layer ¬∑ ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏Çý∏≤ý∏¢ fix ¬∑ 116 PO
create ¬∑ 117 create-PO UX ¬∑ 118 phone basket ¬∑ 119/ADR0045 VAT ¬∑ 120 unify-record-into-PO.** PO is now
THE purchase path (desktop + phone, VAT, order_ref). **Acceptance:** approved request ‚Üí ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏á PO
pre-seeded ‚Üí one-line PO. **OUT (cleanup):** delete `PurchaseRecordForm` + the `record_purchase` RPC.

**Spec 120 review tweak (operator):** the VAT picker (a 3-option dropdown) ‚Üí the accessible `RadioChip`
segmented control (spec 67) with SHORT labels (ý∏Åýπàý∏≠ý∏ô VAT / ý∏£ý∏ßý∏° VAT ýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß / ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏°ý∏µ VAT ‚Äî the full phrases
would overflow the narrow sheet; the live net/VAT/gross line carries the precise meaning). **Default
flipped inclusive ‚Üí exclusive (ý∏Åýπàý∏≠ý∏ô VAT)** ‚Äî a PO is created from a quotation, and Thai quotes are
usually quoted ex-VAT (net + 7%). Surfacing the mode as visible chips + the breakdown is the guard against
the exclusive-transform mis-entry. UI-only (no schema). Sheet test updated (default-exclusive amounts +
RadioChip selection). REUSABLE: ‚â§4 fixed mutually-exclusive options that affect MONEY ‚Üí prefer a visible
RadioChip over a dropdown (the user picks deliberately, sees the effect), but keep labels short or it
overflows.

## Spec 121 ‚Äî PDF support in purchasing attachments (ADR 0046 Layer A) ‚Äî SHIPPED 2026-06-16

**What:** the deferred documents+photos foundation. Purchasing attachments are image-only today
(`pr-attachments` bucket = jpeg/png/webp/heic, downscaled ‚Äî spec 34). Layer A makes a **PDF** attachable

- viewable on the **existing** surfaces (invoice uploader + reference stager) ‚Äî attach a PDF quote/
  invoice to a request. Layers B (PO-level source-doc + side-by-side create-PO surface) and C (AI
  extraction) are separate later units, untouched.

* **kind decision = new `'pdf'`** (over a non-downscale `image` branch): ADR 0046 names `kind image|pdf`;
  viewer dispatches cleanly on kind (iframe vs lightbox); `pra_purpose_kind` auto-blocks a PDF from a
  delivery-confirmation slot; the image-only token trigger skips PDFs; semantic honesty.
* **Migrations (operator-gated):** (1) re-assert `pr-attachments` `allowed_mime_types` += `application/pdf`
  (25 MiB cap stays) + `alter type ‚Ä¶ add value 'pdf'` (no pdf-literal usage in the same file ‚Üí
  same-txn-safe). (2) `pra_pdf_shape` CHECK (pdf content row carries `storage_path`, no `url`) ‚Äî separate
  file because the CHECK _uses_ `'pdf'`.
* **No-downscale upload:** raw PDF bytes (`contentType: application/pdf`) to the canonical
  `.../{att}.pdf` path; metadata-after-upload (spec-24 pattern). PDFs NOT offline-queue-bracketed this
  unit (manual-retry, mirrors invoice uploader ‚Äî recorded seam; `QueuedUpload.ext` stays `PhotoExt`).
* **Viewer:** `AttachmentPdf` (signed-URL `<iframe>` + open-in-new-tab); detail page groups by kind
  (reference images/PDFs/links; invoice images/PDFs); signed URLs minted for image + pdf rows.

**Money posture unchanged.** Gate honored: lint / typecheck / build / **881 unit** local-green ‚Üí
AskUserQuestion "Apply now" ‚Üí db:push (migrations `20260702000000` + `20260702000100` applied to prod) ‚Üí
db:types reconcile (**byte-identical** to the hand-extension) ‚Üí db:test **1081/0**. Then commit + push.

**Build notes (reusable):** (1) `buildPrAttachmentStoragePath` widened `PhotoExt` ‚Üí `AttachmentExt`
(`PhotoExt | "pdf"`) ‚Äî its existing pin test asserted `pdf` ‚Üí null; flipped to assert it builds, added a
truly-invalid-ext case (TDD red‚Üígreen anchor). (2) The detail page's reference grouping used
`kind !== "image"` for links ‚Äî a pdf would have leaked into the link list (and been dropped, url=null);
fixed to `kind === "link"` + a new `referencePdfs`/`invoicePdfs` split. (3) Signed-URL minting widened
to `image || pdf` rows (pdfs were getting no URL). (4) Server actions derive the stored kind from the
validated ext (`attachmentKindForExt`) ‚Äî client-passed kind is not trusted; `findLandedAttachment` now
pins the actual kind (image-only check would mis-replay a pdf). (5) `addDeliveryConfirmationPhoto` stays
image-only on purpose (a receipt photo; `pra_purpose_kind` enforces). **Acceptance owed:** procurement/
back-office user attaches a PDF quote/invoice on `/requests/[id]` ‚Üí uploads un-downscaled + renders in
the iframe viewer; images still work. (Auth-gated route ‚Üí operator-on-live, not preview-verifiable.)
**Recorded seam:** PDF reference attachments are NOT offline-queue-bracketed (manual-retry, mirrors the
invoice uploader; `QueuedUpload.ext` stays `PhotoExt`). **NEXT:** ADR 0046 Layer B (document-first
create-PO: PO-level source-doc + side-by-side surface) ‚Üí Layer C (AI extraction, Claude).

---

## Spec 125 ‚Äî PO source-document attachments (ADR 0046 Layer B, Unit 1) ‚Äî SHIPPED 2026-06-16

**What:** the quotation/invoice a PO is created from now attaches at the **PO level** (ADR 0046
decision 2). Operator picked the **phased "attach-doc first"** cut: this unit = data layer + a doc picker
in the **existing** create-PO sheet (uploaded when the PO is created) + a viewer on the request detail
page. The full **side-by-side wide doc|form surface** (ADR 0046 decision 4) is the next unit.

- **Decisions** (ADR 0046 left these "to decide at spec time"): grain = a **`purchase_order_attachments`
  table** (mirrors pr_attachments; append-only + tombstone-ready; kind image|pdf; **no `purpose` column**
  v1 ‚Äî every PO doc is the source doc, YAGNI; **no token side-table** ‚Äî vestigial AppSheet bridge).
  Storage = a **new private `po-attachments` bucket** (image + application/pdf from day one ‚Äî the Layer A
  lesson), path `{po_id}/{att}.{ext}` (a PO spans projects ‚Üí po_id is the scope). Writer = **direct INSERT
  under RLS** (mirror pr_attachments), **content rows only** (no tombstone arm/removal UI v1).
- **Upload-on-submit** (ADR 0046 decision 3, resolves the no-po_id-yet chicken-and-egg): the sheet keeps
  the file client-side; `createPurchaseOrder` returns `poId` ‚Üí browser uploads to `po-attachments/{poId}/‚Ä¶`
  ‚Üí `addPurchaseOrderAttachment` records the row. PDFs raw (no spec-34 downscale), images prepared. A
  failed doc upload is **non-fatal** (the PO stands; the doc is optional) ‚Äî toast warns; no re-attach
  surface until the PO-doc page lands (recorded seam).
- **Viewer:** the PR detail page (`/requests/[id]`) shows the PO's source doc when the ticket has a
  `purchase_order_id` (there's no PO detail page yet) ‚Äî reuses the Layer A `AttachmentPdf` / `ZoomablePhoto`.

**Money posture unchanged.** Gate honored: lint / typecheck / build / **885 unit** local-green ‚Üí
AskUserQuestion "Apply now" ‚Üí db:push (`20260703000000` table+bucket; **`20260703000100` fix-forward**) ‚Üí
db:types reconcile (content byte-identical; only view-block ordering differed, regen committed) ‚Üí db:test
**1104/0**.

**KEY LESSON (reusable):** the new RLS policies first shipped with **bare** `current_user_role()` /
`auth.uid()` (I mirrored pr_attachments' migration SOURCE, which predates the rank-3 eval-once hardening ‚Äî
the LIVE policies were since wrapped). **db:test file 40 (rls-eval-once) caught it** (2 failures) ‚Üí a
fix-forward migration (`20260703000100`) DROP+CREATEs both policies wrapped in `(select ‚Ä¶)`. **Any NEW
public RLS policy must wrap auth calls in `(select ‚Ä¶)` from the start** ‚Äî don't copy a pre-2026-06-25
migration's bare form. **Acceptance owed:** procurement user creates a PO + attaches a PDF/photo quote ‚Üí
PO created, doc saved; any member ticket's detail page shows the source doc. (Procurement-gated route ‚Üí
operator-on-live.) **NEXT:** ADR 0046 Layer B Unit 2 (the side-by-side wide create-PO surface) ‚Üí Layer C
(AI extraction). Seams: PO-doc removal/replace UI; multi-doc + quote/invoice `purpose` split; PO detail page.

---

## Spec 126 ‚Äî Document-first create-PO surface (ADR 0046 Layer B, Unit 2) ‚Äî SHIPPED 2026-06-16

**What:** the attached quote/invoice is now a **readable reference while filling the PO** (ADR 0046
decision 4). Spec 125 added the doc picker + upload-on-submit (filename chip only); this makes the doc
preview side-by-side. **Operator decisions** (AskUserQuestion, after a visualize mockup ‚Äî the right move
for an un-preview-verifiable procurement+lg surface): container = **wide modal** (over a dedicated route ‚Äî
preserves the in-memory ticket selection from all 3 entry points); flow = **attach-inside-expands**.
**NO schema** (pure UI on Unit 1's table/bucket/action) ‚Üí no operator gate.

- `BottomSheet` gains **`wide?`** ‚Äî the RIGHT panel grows `max-w-md ‚Üí lg:max-w-5xl` (no effect on the
  bottom variant). Create-PO sheet passes `wide={docFile != null}`.
- **Client object-URL preview** (ADR 0046 decision 3 ‚Äî no upload while filling): PDF via `<iframe>`,
  image via `<img>` on a `blob:` URL (revoked on change/unmount); bytes still upload on submit (spec 125).
- **Split on lg+, toggle on phone:** doc attached ‚Üí 2-col `lg:grid-cols-[3fr_2fr]` (doc left, form right);
  below `lg` a ýπÄý∏≠ý∏Åý∏™ý∏≤ý∏£‚áÑý∏üý∏≠ý∏£ýπåý∏° toggle (`hidden lg:block` swap, fresh attach lands on ýπÄý∏≠ý∏Åý∏™ý∏≤ý∏£). No doc ‚Üí the
  plain single-column form + an attach button; the attach affordance (ýπÄý∏õý∏¥ý∏î/ýπÄý∏õý∏•ý∏µýπàý∏¢ý∏ô/ý∏ôý∏≥ý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏Å) moves into the
  doc pane once a doc is present. All 3 entry points inherit it (shared sheet; sheet is always `side="right"`).

**Gate:** lint / typecheck / build / **885 unit** green; no schema ‚Üí no db:push, pgTAP unchanged (1104);
committed + pushed. **Acceptance** (procurement, lg-only, not preview-verifiable ‚Üí operator-on-live): open
create-PO, attach a PDF/photo ‚Üí tablet/PC shows doc-left form-right; phone toggles; submit creates + saves.
**METHOD note:** mockup (visualize) ‚Üí AskUserQuestion (container + flow) ‚Üí build ‚Äî the un-preview-verifiable
UI loop (spec 108/117/118). **NEXT:** ADR 0046 Layer C (AI extraction ‚Üí prefill the verified form, Claude).
Seams unchanged from Unit 1 (PO-doc removal/replace UI, multi-doc + purpose split, PO detail page).

## Spec 124 - CI worker job + codified test-tier policy (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE (2026-06-16). Implements ADR 0048. CI ran only app lint/typecheck/test;
the `worker/` package (own lockfile) was never built/tested in CI. Add a secret-free `worker` job
(install --frozen-lockfile ‚Üí typecheck ‚Üí test in `worker/`); the spec-123 drift test rides the
existing app `pnpm test` job (no new wiring). `db:test`/`test:e2e` stay local Tier-B gates; a manual
`workflow_dispatch` `db-test` job is added but inert (guarded on a repo variable + secret the
operator must provision ‚Äî Tier C). CI config = no app code; TDD obligation carried by the worker's
own suite + the drift guard. Validated locally: `cd worker && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile &&
pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` ‚Üí 6 green.

**Done:** `.github/workflows/ci.yml` gains a `worker` job (checkout ‚Üí pnpm ‚Üí node22 ‚Üí
install/typecheck/test in `worker/`, cache keyed on `worker/pnpm-lock.yaml`) + a `workflow_dispatch`
trigger + an inert `db-test` job (`if: workflow_dispatch && vars.ENABLE_DB_TEST == 'true'` ‚Äî skipped
until the operator opts in + provisions `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN`). **Gate:** worker sequence green
locally (6 tests); YAML parses (js-yaml exit 0); app suite/typecheck unaffected (only `ci.yml` +
docs changed ‚Äî no app code, no rerun needed; 889 from spec 123 stands). **Operator-gated:** flip ADR
0048 Proposed‚ÜíAccepted; to activate Tier C, add the `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN` secret + set repo
variable `ENABLE_DB_TEST=true` (confirm `supabase link` needs no interactive input in CI). Same
foreign-file staging caution as specs 122/123.

## Quality-debt batch 122-124 ‚Äî committed (2026-06-16)

"Proceed in my stead" wrap-up. ADRs 0047 + 0048 flipped Proposed‚ÜíAccepted. Ran `pnpm db:types`
against the LIVE linked DB (CLI still authed) ‚Äî validated `gen-db-types.ts` end-to-end AND revealed
the committed app types were ~52 lines stale vs live (a migration was pushed without regenerating);
synced both copies to live (raw 2333 lines, identical). All three units committed to branch
`quality-debt-122-124` (one atomic commit; foreign `sdd-2026-06.md` + untracked `uxui-*.md` /
`app-workflows-and-roles.md` excluded). **NOT pushed** ‚Äî push + PR are laptop-only (CLAUDE.md).

**Gotcha fixed (important):** the husky/lint-staged pre-commit ran prettier on the app types copy
(not prettier-ignored) but NOT the worker copy (`worker/` is in `.prettierignore`) ‚Üí the two diverged
INSIDE the first commit and the drift guard failed. Fix: add `src/lib/db/database.types.ts` to BOTH
`.prettierignore` and the eslint `globalIgnores` (generated files must never be hand-formatted, else
every future `db:types`+commit re-breaks the guard). Re-synced raw output to both, amended.

**Final gate (committed state):** drift green ¬∑ lint clean ¬∑ typecheck app + worker clean ¬∑ 889 unit
green (129 files) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. **Operator remaining:** `git push` branch + open PR; (Tier C
CI) add `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN` secret + repo var `ENABLE_DB_TEST=true`.

Migration applied to prod (`db:push` operator-confirmed); `db:types` reconciled (typecheck green vs live schema, worker copy synced); pgTAP **52 files / 1141 asserts / 0 failures** (file 36 added). lint clean ¬∑ 909 unit green ¬∑ build green. Full design spec 129; outbound only (prc-ops source of truth ‚Üí PEAK accounting). **PEAK API reality (researched):** REST/JSON, docs developers.peakaccount.com (llms.txt+OpenAPI), auth `POST /api/v1/clienttoken` from API Key+Secret Key, free 3-mo UAT; endpoints `/contacts` (+ tax-id autofill), `/expenses` (+ -void), `/billingnotes`, `/invoices`/`/quotations`/`/receipts`/`/creditnotes`, `/products`/`/services`, `/paymentmethods`, `/dailyjournals`; rate limits + webhooks. **U1 (credential-free):** migration `20260705000000_create_peak_sync` ‚Äî enums peak_entity_type/peak_sync_operation/peak_sync_status/peak_doc_type; `peak_sync_outbox` (queue, deliberately mutable, payload jsonb so PEAK-shape-agnostic) + `peak_sync_links` (idempotency map, UNIQUE (source_table,source_id,peak_doc_type)) ‚Äî both zero user access (RLS on, no policies, revoke anon/authenticated), worker-drains-via-service-role, mirrors notification_outbox (ADR 0037, no new audit_action); `enqueue_peak_sync` SECURITY DEFINER RPC (staff sa/pm/super gate; idempotent ‚Äî returns existing live job for (source,operation) instead of duplicating). pgTAP file 36 (16 asserts: catalog, enum labels, RLS, zero-policy, links UNIQUE, authenticated read refusal √ó2, enqueue visitor-refused + sa happy + idempotent-no-dup + pending start). database.types hand-extended (2 tables + enqueue_peak_sync Fn + 4 enums + Constants), worker copy synced. **Units ahead:** U2 pure transforms (contractor/supplier‚Üí/contacts, PO/dc_payment‚Üí/expenses) + COA/WHT mapping (needs accountant input + fetch PEAK payload schemas); U3 worker PEAK client+drainer (needs UAT creds); U4 capture triggers + sync-status admin UI. Blockers (downstream): UAT creds, COA/WHT mapping, PEAK payload field schemas.

## Spec 130 U1 - DC self-service portal: external identity + binding (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. Migrations applied to prod (`db:push` operator-confirmed); pgTAP **53 files / 1162 asserts / 0 failures**; lint clean ¬∑ 910 unit green ¬∑ build green ¬∑ types reconciled. Two prod defects caught by pgTAP + fixed-forward in `20260706000200`: (1) `gen_random_bytes` (pgcrypto) unavailable ‚Üí token now via `gen_random_uuid()`; (2) the two new SELECT policies called `current_user_role()`/`auth.uid()` bare ‚Üí wrapped `(select ‚Ä¶)` per the rls-eval-once doctrine (file 40). ADR 0051 (Accepted: external partner access model ‚Äî row-level RLS tier; same-app hard-bounded /portal segment + LINE auth, operator-confirmed). Operator (2026-06-16): full DC portal, DC first, clients later. Spec 130; this unit = the identity foundation only (no portal UI, no row-level RLS yet ‚Äî that's U2). **App:** roleHome `contractor ‚Üí /portal` (test-first); `contractor` added to user_role union + Constants + USER_ROLE_LABEL ("ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤ (DC)"). **DB:** migration A `20260706000000` `contractor` role enum value (own txn, ADR-0008 split); migration B `20260706000100` ‚Äî `contractor_users` (user_id PK ‚Üí one binding per user, contractor_id FK; RLS: staff-or-self select, RPC-only writes) + `contractor_invites` (single-use expiring token, PM-issued; RLS staff select); `current_user_contractor_id()` SECURITY DEFINER helper (the row-level-RLS primitive for U2, contractor_id axis ‚ä• ADR-0013 project axis; reads contractor_users as definer ‚Üí no recursion); `create_contractor_invite` RPC (pm/super gate, 48-hex token, 14-day expiry); `claim_contractor_invite` RPC (the ONLY sanctioned role‚Üícontractor writer: visitor-only gate protects staff, one-binding-per-user no-rebind, single-use + unexpired token, writes binding + flips role + marks invite + role_change audit). pgTAP file 37 (21 asserts incl. exhaustive claim guards: invalid/expired/already-used/staff-can't-claim/bound-can't-rebind, helper NULL‚Üíresolves, role flip, audit). user_role pin updated file 01 (ten‚Üíeleven). types hand-extended (2 tables + 3 Fns + enum), worker synced. U2 = row-level RLS dual-policies + scoped money grants (exhaustive cross-party pgTAP); U3 portal read surfaces + /portal middleware boundary; U4 self-edit + PM approval queue. Out of v1: DC labor self-capture, client portal (reuses boundary). Lesson: `gen_random_bytes` is not available on the linked DB (pgcrypto not in path) ‚Äî use `gen_random_uuid()` for tokens; new RLS policies must wrap role/uid calls in `(select ‚Ä¶)` (file-40 eval-once guard).

## Spec 130 U2 - DC portal: row-level RLS + scoped money read (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. Migration applied to prod (`db:push` operator-confirmed); pgTAP **54 files / 1181 asserts / 0 failures**; lint clean ¬∑ 910 unit green ¬∑ build green ¬∑ types reconciled. (pgTAP caught two test-only fixes: file-38 plan 20‚Üí19 miscount; file-24 contractors `policies_are` pin updated to include the new external read policy ‚Äî migration logic was correct first time, isolation asserts all passed.) The isolation core. Migration `20260707000000_contractor_portal_rls`. **Dual-policy** (additive permissive SELECT scoped to `(select current_user_contractor_id())`, eval-once-wrapped) on `contractors` (own row), `workers` (own crew), `labor_logs` (own DC days; `worker_type_snapshot='dc'`). Internal role-level policies untouched (helper is NULL for staff ‚Üí external policy adds zero rows). **Money posture preserved:** contractors/workers/labor_logs keep money hidden by the existing COLUMN grants (day_rate / day_rate_snapshot have no authenticated grant ‚Äî a DC reading own rows still can't read those columns). `dc_payments` stays FULLY zero-grant (file 35 intact); a DC reads their own payments + amounts via `get_my_dc_payments()` SECURITY DEFINER reader (hard contractor filter ‚Üí internal/NULL-contractor sessions get zero rows; current-state anti-join). PM payroll/cost surfaces keep their admin-client reads ‚Äî untouched. pgTAP file 38 (20 asserts, exhaustive cross-party: uA sees only A's contractor/crew/days/payment; day_rate(\_snapshot) ‚Üí 42501 even for DC; raw dc_payments ‚Üí 42501; uB never sees A; site_admin still sees all + zero contractor payments). types hand-extended (get_my_dc_payments Fn), worker synced. U3 = /portal read surfaces + middleware boundary; U4 = self-edit (bank/tax/docs) + PM approval staging (+ contact_bank/docs row scope). Out: DC labor self-capture, client portal.

## Spec 130 U3 - DC portal: /portal surfaces + boundary (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. **No schema change** (UI + a server action over the U1/U2 DB), no prod gate. **Boundary = per-page `requireRole`, not new middleware** ‚Äî the app has no central middleware (the `proxy.ts` in require-role's comment is "when it ships", never shipped); `requireRole` already routes the not-allowed branch through `roleHome`, so `requireRole(["contractor"])` on /portal bounces staff to their home AND internal pages' existing `requireRole` bounces a contractor to /portal. ADR 0051 ¬ß7 satisfied by the established mechanism; a central defense-in-depth guard is a recorded seam. **Surfaces:** `/portal` landing (own profile/crew/payment-history) ‚Äî reads via the **RLS-respecting server client, never admin** (ADR 0051 ¬ß5), so the U2 row-level policies are the enforcement; amounts via `get_my_dc_payments()`; rate columns never selected. `/portal/claim?token=` ‚Äî visitor-reachable (NOT requireRole-contractor, else a fresh signup bounces to /coming-soon), gated on signed-in, already-bound ‚Üí /portal; `ClaimButton` (client) ‚Üí `claimContractorInvite` action ‚Üí `claim_contractor_invite` RPC via the RLS session. `/portal/loading.tsx` parity. Pure `claimErrorToThai` (RPC msg ‚Üí Thai, in its own module ‚Äî a `use server` file may only export async fns; the build caught the sync export) TDD, 2 tests. Two architecture-guard tests updated for the new surface: feature-components-structure (allow `portal/` domain folder), nav-back-affordance (portal=NON_DETAIL, portal/claim=EXCLUDED). Verification: typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ 912 unit ¬∑ build all green. Browser preview skipped ‚Äî /portal is auth+contractor-binding-gated (redirects to /login locally), acceptance = operator phone pass (claim a real invite, see only own data). U4 next: self-edit (bank/tax/docs) ‚Üí pending ‚Üí PM approval queue + contact_bank/docs row-scope.

## Spec 130 U4 - DC portal: bank-change request + PM approval (anti-fraud) (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. Migrations applied to prod (`db:push` operator-confirmed); pgTAP **55 files / 1200 asserts / 0 failures**; lint clean ¬∑ 917 unit green ¬∑ build green ¬∑ types reconciled. (pgTAP caught a prod fn bug fixed-forward in `20260708000100`: `set status = case when ‚Ä¶ then 'approved' else 'rejected' end` yields TEXT ‚Üí 42804; cast the CASE to `::contractor_change_status`. Lesson: a CASE assigning an enum column needs an explicit cast.) The anti-fraud gate (ADR 0051 ¬ß6). Scoped to **bank** (the actual fraud vector; profile self-edit = seam). Migration `20260708000000_contractor_bank_change`: enum `contractor_change_status` (pending|approved|rejected); `contractor_bank_change_requests` (proposed bank cols + status + requested_by/decided_by/decided_at; the row IS the audit trail ‚Äî mirrors set_contact_bank which writes no audit_log either); RLS grant-select + two read policies (own contractor via current_user_contractor_id; pm/super) eval-once-wrapped ‚Üí site_admin matches neither = 0 rows (money hidden); writes RPC-only. `submit_contractor_bank_change` (contractor-only, own, one-pending-at-a-time) + `decide_contractor_bank_change` (pm/super; **approve upserts the live contact_bank** via the set_contact_bank contractor branch, reject discards; refuses re-decide). pgTAP file 39 (19 asserts: submit own/dup/non-contractor-refused; RLS uA-sees-own / SA-0 / pm-sees-queue; decide SA-refused / pm-approve-applies-to-contact_bank / status+decided_by / re-decide-refused / reject-doesn't-apply). **App:** pure `validateBankChange` (TDD, 4 tests); `submitBankChange` + `decideBankChange` actions (portal/actions.ts, both async ‚Äî no use-server sync-export trap); `BankChangeForm` (portal: form, or "rý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥" notice while pending) wired on /portal; `BankChangeDecision` (approve/reject) + a pending-requests block on the existing `/contacts/contractors/[id]` PM page (admin-read, behind requireRole). types hand-extended (table + enum + 2 RPCs). Seams: profile-field self-edit, contact-docs upload + storage RLS, a dedicated PM approval queue (today the pending block lives on the contact detail page).

## Spec 131 U1 - DC onboarding packet: data layer (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. Migrations applied to prod; pgTAP **56 files / 1215 asserts / 0 failures**; lint clean ¬∑ 925 unit green ¬∑ build green ¬∑ types reconciled. (pgTAP caught a real security bug, fixed-forward in `20260709000200`: the consent RPCs' self-check `v_is_self := current_user_contractor_id() = p_contractor` is NULL for an unbound caller, so `if not (NULL or false)` = `if NULL` never fired ‚Üí an unbound visitor BYPASSED the gate and could record/revoke any contractor's consent. Fix: `coalesce(‚Ä¶ = ‚Ä¶, false)`. **Lesson: a `helper() = x` self-check needs coalesce-to-false whenever the helper can return NULL ‚Äî 3-valued logic silently opens the gate.** Audited the session's other RPCs: submit_contractor_bank_change + get_my_dc_payments already null-guard explicitly; only the consent pair had it.) Defines what we collect from a DC (operator: DCs are individuals ‚Äî ID, background-check consent, bank+book, phone, emergency contact; "think what might happen"; differ by type). Full design spec 131. Also recorded the LINE-OA decision (ADR 0051 addendum): one OA now (staff+DC, per-user menus, audience-gated notifications), client OA later. **Migration A** `20260709000000_contact_doc_types`: ALTER contact_doc_purpose += consent, house_registration, insurance, company_cert, vat_cert, contract (own txn; no pgTAP pin on this enum). **Migration B** `20260709000100_contractor_consents`: contractors += emergency_contact_name/relation/phone + date_of_birth (PII not money ‚Äî ride contractors grant/RLS incl. spec-130 own-row read; added to staff column write-grants); `contractor_consent_kind` enum (pdpa_data|background_check); `contractor_consents` table (dated, REVOCABLE ‚Äî PDPA; recorded_by, document_id‚Üísigned doc, revoked_at) RLS own-contractor + staff read, RPC-only writes; `record_contractor_consent` (self-for-own OR staff) + `revoke_contractor_consent` (self-for-own OR pm/super) SECURITY DEFINER. **Consent is a first-class record, not a checkbox (PDPA spine).** pgTAP file 51 (15 asserts: catalog/columns/new doc-type cast; record gates self/staff/refused-other; read own/staff/visitor-0; revoke own + revoked_at set + unrelated-party-refused + denied-revoke-intact). **App:** pure `contractorPacketStatus` + `dcTypeOfSubtype` + required-by-type constants (TDD, 8 tests) ‚Äî completeness derived, not stored; individual checklist (ID/phone/emergency/bank/bankbook/PDPA+bg-consent) vs company (+reg cert/ý∏Ýý∏û.20); insurance/house-reg available but NOT required. **No TS hand-extend** this unit ‚Äî nothing in TS consumes the new schema yet (helper is self-contained, UI is U2); db:types regenerates post-push, sync guard stays green. U2 = PM + portal UI (emergency-contact + consent capture + doc upload w/ external-write storage RLS + the completeness checklist). Seams: background-check PROVIDER (manual/store-only now), doc expiry reminders.

## Spec 131 U2b - DC portal self-service: emergency contact + consent capture (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. Migration applied to prod; db:types reconciled; typecheck clean ¬∑ db-types-sync green; pgTAP **57 files / 1221 asserts / 0 failures** (file 52 = 6/6). The DC self-completes the no-storage parts of their file on /portal. **Document upload + external-write storage RLS = U2c** (the hard, security-sensitive piece ‚Äî given its own focused pass, not crammed at fatigue). **Migration** `20260710000000_update_own_emergency_contact`: a SECURITY DEFINER RPC writing ONLY the 4 emergency/DOB columns for `current_user_contractor_id()` ‚Äî **deliberately an RPC, not a broad own-row UPDATE policy** (RLS gates rows, grants gate columns; a blanket policy + the existing broad contractors column-grant would let a DC change their own status/tax_id ‚Äî the column-scope-via-RPC closes that). pgTAP file 52 (6 asserts: own-edit applies, DOB set, other contractor untouched, unbound-visitor + staff-without-binding both 42501). **App:** pure `validateEmergencyContact` (TDD, 5 tests); `updateOwnEmergencyContact` + `recordOwnConsent` portal actions (recordOwnConsent passes the portal-read contractor id ‚Äî safe, the RPC self-validates so a forged id 42501s); `PortalSelfEdit` (emergency form prefilled + consent capture w/ PDPA notice + per-kind status) on /portal; portal profile read widened (+id/emergency/dob) + own-consents read (RLS). types hand-extend (update_own_emergency_contact Fn; record_contractor_consent already present from U1 regen). U2c remains: DC doc upload + storage RLS; company-doc presence; PM-side emergency-entry form (DC self-edit covers entry now). Seam: PDPA revoke from the portal (today record-only on portal; revoke via PM).

## Spec 131 U2c - DC document upload + external-write storage RLS (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. Migration applied to prod; db:types reconciled; typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ 934 unit ¬∑ build all green; pgTAP **58 files / 1239 asserts / 0 failures** (new file 53 = 18, file 48 posture fix). **The last DC self-service piece and the most security-sensitive surface in the feature** ‚Äî a bound DC uploads + reads their OWN onboarding documents from /portal, scoped so they can ONLY touch their own contractor's path. Documents apply directly (evidence, not money ‚Äî the payout bank stays staged+approved, spec 130 U4); no approval gate on the file. **Migration** `20260711000000_portal_contact_docs`: (1) two `storage.objects` policies on the contact-docs bucket for the external tier ‚Äî authenticated INSERT + SELECT WHERE `(storage.foldername(name))[2] = (select current_user_contractor_id()::text)` and `[1]='contractor'` (ADDITIVE to the spec-97 PM upload policy; NULL-contractor staff/unbound matches neither ‚Üí internal posture untouched; helper wrapped `(select ‚Ä¶)` for eval-once; `objects.name` qualified for the name-capture hazard); (2) `contact_attachments` += `grant select` to authenticated + own-contractor SELECT policy (was zero-grant ‚Äî internal staff still read via the admin client; INSERT stays RPC-only); (3) `add_contact_document` widened with a `coalesce(v_self is not null and p_contractor_id=v_self and supplier/sp null, false)` own-doc branch (staff path byte-identical; the 3-valued-logic trap closed ‚Äî [[rls-self-check-coalesce]]); (4) `my_contact_bank_present()` boolean reader (presence only, no account number ‚Äî the get_my_dc_payments precedent) so the portal checklist can reuse contractorPacketStatus without granting the zero-grant contact_bank to the DC. **App:** pure `document-types.ts` (PORTAL_DOC_PURPOSES = id_card/bank_book/consent/house_registration/insurance + Thai labels + guard ‚Äî company_cert/vat_cert are PM-collected, NOT DC-uploadable; 6 unit tests); `addOwnContactDocument` action (derives the contractor id SERVER-SIDE via current_user_contractor_id rpc ‚Äî never trusts the client ‚Äî and REBUILDS the path); `getOwnContractorDocuments` (RLS-session read + RLS-session createSignedUrls ‚Äî NEVER the admin client, ADR 0051 ¬ß5); `PortalDocuments` client uploader (mirrors the PM ContactDocumentsBlock machine on the browser RLS client); /portal renders the uploader + the completeness checklist (reuses contractorPacketStatus, own docs/consents/bank-presence). PM completeness card: `getContactDocuments` now reports company_cert/vat_cert PRESENCE ‚Üí wired into the company-DC packet (was hardcoded false). **Verification ‚Äî cross-party DENIAL proven at the SQL/policy level** (pgTAP file 53: real storage.objects rows ‚Äî A cannot upload/read/record B's; unbound visitor denied everywhere; contact_attachments own-contractor scoping). **The positive upload path is an OPERATOR phone smoke test** ‚Äî the pgTAP runner has no Storage API (spec 23), so the end-to-end "a real DC claims an invite, uploads their ID card, confirms it lands, confirms they cannot reach another contractor's docs" is NOT claimed by the automated suite and awaits the operator. Seams: PM-side upload UI for company_cert/vat_cert (presence wired, no PM uploader yet ‚Äî DC offers the five individual docs); PDPA revoke from the portal (still PM-only).

Closes the two seams U2c left. **Seam A (PM company papers):** a company DC's contact page now lets the PM upload ý∏´ý∏ôý∏±ý∏áý∏™ý∏∑ý∏≠ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏£ý∏≠ý∏áý∏öý∏£ý∏¥ý∏©ý∏±ý∏ó (company_cert) + ý∏Ý.ý∏û.20 (vat_cert) alongside ID card / bank book. `CONTRACTOR_DOC_PURPOSES` superset + `isContractorDocPurpose` guard (TDD ‚Äî id_card/bank_book/company_cert/vat_cert; suppliers + service providers keep the base set); `addContactDocument` branches purpose validation by kind (contractor ‚Üí superset); `getContactDocuments` now signs company_cert/vat_cert URLs (was U2c presence-bool ‚Üí now string|null); `ContactDocumentsBlock` renders the two extra rows only when `showCompanyDocs` (contractor && subtype dc_company ‚Äî individuals/suppliers unchanged, the upload test pins both); the completeness packet reads `!= null`. **Seam B (portal PDPA withdraw):** `revokeOwnConsent` portal action ‚Üí revoke_contractor_consent (self-validated, sets revoked_at, no deletion); portal consent read += id; `PortalSelfEdit` ConsentCard gains a ý∏¢ý∏ÅýπÄý∏•ý∏¥ý∏Å withdraw control next to each active ‚úì (the checklist's consent item reopens on withdraw). Verified-by-checklist + component tests (isContractorDocPurpose guard, the company-doc-rows render test); auth-gated role-specific pages so no preview exercise (no LINE session/role/data in the dev server). **DC onboarding packet (spec 131) is now feature-complete.** Remaining cross-feature seams unchanged: dedicated PM approval queue; client portal (project_id axis). Standing: U2c operator phone smoke test of the upload path still pending.

## Spec 132 U1 - DC portal profile self-edit: contactability (2026-06-16)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-16. Migration applied to prod; db:types reconciled; typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **943 unit** (+6) ¬∑ build all green; pgTAP **59 files / 1250 asserts / 0 failures** (new file 54 = 11). New spec 132 (DC portal profile self-edit, **cashout-scoped** ‚Äî a DC may self-edit only what's needed to stay reachable/payable; money + identity stay controlled). Also added the missing spec-131 + spec-132 rows to the feature-spec index README. **Decision (operator):** `tax_id` stays **PM-only, entered from the uploaded ID card** (U2c) ‚Äî NOT DC-self-edit, NOT staged; PM verification against the document beats DC self-assertion and avoids a staging machine for one identity/tax field (feeds WHT + PEAK). **U1 scope:** contactability direct self-edit ‚Äî phone/email/contact_person/mailing_address. **Migration** `20260712000000_update_own_contractor_profile`: a SECURITY DEFINER RPC writing ONLY those four columns for `current_user_contractor_id()` (42501 if unbound) ‚Äî **column scope by construction, not a broad own-row UPDATE policy** (the spec-131-U2b reasoning: RLS gates rows, grants gate columns; a blanket policy + the broad contractors column-grant would let a DC change their own status/name/tax_id). Direct, no staging (contactability is not money). pgTAP file 54 proves: own-edit applies (4 cols), **name/status/tax_id untouched** (a blacklisted A stays blacklisted), another contractor untouched, unbound-visitor + staff-without-binding both 42501. **App:** pure `validateContractorProfile` (TDD, 7 tests ‚Äî lengths mirror the contractors CHECKs, optional/blank-clears, basic email shape); `updateOwnContactInfo` portal action; `PortalContactInfo` edit form on /portal (tax_id + specialty stay read-only display); types hand-extend (update_own_contractor_profile Fn, both app + worker). Verified-by-checklist for the form (pure validator carries its tests); auth-gated page ‚Üí no preview. **Cashout-portal field doctrine now codified in spec 132** (bank=staged, tax_id=PM-from-ID-card, contactability=direct, name/status/subtype=locked). Open seam (deferred, not decided): whether emergency-contact / insurance / house-registration belong on a strictly-cashout portal (worker-safety/HR, not payment) ‚Äî kept as-is for now.

## Spec 130 U5 - PM portal-invite issuance UI (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only ‚Äî NO migration / NO prod gate** (the create_contractor_invite RPC shipped in 130 U1; this unit only surfaces it). typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **946 unit** (+3) ¬∑ build all green. **Closes the gap that blocked the U2c smoke test AND real DC onboarding:** the claim side (/portal/claim?token=) shipped in 130 U3, but the ISSUE side had no UI ‚Äî create_contractor_invite was called nowhere in the app, so a PM had no way to mint the link a DC needs. **App:** `createContractorInvite` action (contacts/actions.ts, pmSession gate ‚Üí the U1 RPC; returns the token); pure `buildClaimUrl(origin, token)` (TDD, 3 tests ‚Äî the /portal/claim?token= shape in one place, trailing-slash + url-encode safe); `ContractorInviteBlock` on the contractor contact page ‚Äî "ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏•ý∏¥ý∏áý∏ÅýπåýπÄý∏äý∏¥ý∏ç" button ‚Üí generates a single-use 14-day token ‚Üí shows the claim URL (built from window.location.origin) + ý∏Ñý∏±ý∏îý∏•ý∏≠ý∏Å copy-to-clipboard; if the contractor is already bound to a portal user (contractor_users, staff RLS read) it shows "ýπÄý∏äý∏∑ýπàý∏≠ý∏°ý∏öý∏±ý∏çý∏äý∏µý∏ûý∏≠ý∏£ýπåý∏óý∏±ý∏•ýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß" instead. Verified-by-checklist for the UI (pure buildClaimUrl carries its tests; the action gate + RPC are existing/tested); auth-gated PM page ‚Üí no preview. **The U2c operator phone smoke test is now unblocked:** PM opens a contractor ‚Üí ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏•ý∏¥ý∏áý∏ÅýπåýπÄý∏äý∏¥ý∏ç ‚Üí sends the link via LINE ‚Üí DC claims ‚Üí DC uploads their ID card on /portal ‚Üí confirm it lands + that they cannot reach another contractor's docs.

## Spec 134 U1 - Purchase-order detail page + ticket link-in (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only ‚Äî NO migration / NO prod gate** (reads the spec-115 `purchase_orders` table + its existing back-office SELECT RLS; no schema change). typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **959 unit** (+13) ¬∑ all green. Closes the PO **viewing** gap ADR 0044 / spec 115 left: POs were data-only (derived status/total, no screen) ‚Äî once tickets were bundled, the PO scattered back into the worklist as loose rows. First unit of spec 134 (operator decision this session: PO detail + worklist grouping, **no new primary tab**; partial delivery = across-ticket for ~98%, split-on-receipt for the 1‚Äì2%, gated to U3+ADR). **New page** `/requests/orders/[poId]` (`src/app/requests/orders/[poId]/page.tsx`) ‚Äî a drill-down UNDER the purchasing surface (DetailHeader back-bar to /requests, not a HubNav tab; static `orders` segment beats the sibling `[requestId]` dynamic route). PURCHASING_ROLES gate (SA sees PO structure + roll-up); RLS decides readability so unknown id == forbidden id == Thai 404 (the /requests convention). **Money posture (spec 106 / ADR 0038):** per-line `amount` + the PO total read ONLY via the admin client and shown ONLY to back office (`isBackOfficeRole` = pm/procurement/super, NOT site_admin); the derived STATUS needs no money so SA still sees it. **Pure seam (TDD, failing test first):** `src/lib/purchasing/po-detail.ts` `buildPoDetailView(lines)` ‚Üí `{status, total, activeLineCount}` ‚Äî composes spec-115 `derivePurchaseOrderStatus` + `purchaseOrderTotal` and applies the ADR-0044-¬ß5 rejected/cancelled exclusion to the total + count (the one piece neither helper covers); 5 unit tests. **Supporting:** `PURCHASE_ORDER_STATUS_LABEL` (Thai; open/ordered/partially_received/received ‚Äî derived union, not a DB enum, so its own label test outside the Constants-driven MAPS) + `purchaseOrderStatusPillClasses` (maps onto the per-ticket palette: open zinc ¬∑ ordered amber ¬∑ partial sky ¬∑ received emerald; exhaustive switch + tests in status-colors.test). **Link-in:** `/requests/[requestId]` now reads the PO's `po_number` and shows "ý∏™ýπàý∏ßý∏ôý∏Çý∏≠ý∏áýπÉý∏öý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ PO-#### ‚Üí" when a ticket is grouped (replaces the spec-125 "no PO detail page yet" note). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page ‚Üí no preview: needs a LINE session + back-office role + a real PO with members; the pure roll-up + label + pill carry the tests). **Next:** U2 = worklist ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á band groups by PO (phone cards + desktop grid); **U3 (within-ticket partial via split) stays GATED on a new ADR amending 0044 ¬ß7** ‚Äî amount-split + photo-requirement + which-row-keeps-identity decisions belong there.

## Spec 134 U2a - Worklist PO grouping (phone) + Lalamove research (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only ‚Äî NO migration / NO prod gate** (reads spec-115 purchase_orders + existing RLS). typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **963 unit** (+4) ¬∑ all green. Second slice of spec 134. Operator asked to also handle "proof attachments" + "check Lalamove API (apply future soon)". **U2 split (per spec allowance): 2a = pure helper + phone cards (THIS unit); 2b = desktop grid grouping (deferred ‚Äî the ProcurementGrid table sub-grouping + prev/next nav + bundle-selection is heavy client work, kept clean for its own session).** **Pure seam (TDD, failing test first):** `src/lib/purchasing/po-grouping.ts` `groupByPurchaseOrder(rows)` ‚Üí `{poGroups (first-appearance order), loose}`; 4 unit tests. **Wiring:** `purchase_order_id` added to `PR_LIST_COLUMNS` (and the duplicate append removed from the ticket detail select); `/requests` procurement phone pipeline now collapses the ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á band ‚Äî for each PO appearing there it reads the PO facts (po_number/supplier/eta) + derives status+line-count from the PO's **FULL** member set (not just the in-transit rows visible under any active filter) via `buildPoDetailView`, rendering one `PoGroupCard` (links to the U1 detail) per PO with loose tickets keeping their own `PurchaseRequestCard`. Desktop grid + non-procurement list unchanged. New server-safe component `po-group-card.tsx` (single anchor, PO status pill). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated procurement page ‚Üí no preview; the pure grouper + roll-up carry the tests). **Lalamove research (NOT built):** `docs/research/lalamove-api-2026-06.md` ‚Äî v3 API (HMAC-SHA256 signing, sandbox/prod base URLs, quotation‚Üíorder‚Üítrack‚ÜíPOD endpoints, webhook v3 incl. POD_STATUS_CHANGED + out-of-order/retry/200-fast constraints, TH vehicle tiers, prepaid-wallet billing, ¬ß8 sandbox/partner-support blockers). Design seams added to spec 134 as **Unit 4 (FUTURE)**: proof-of-delivery = new `proof_of_delivery` attachment purpose (carrier-provenance, copied into our Storage, PO-anchored + fanned to tickets); provider-abstracted `DeliveryProvider` + dispatch-outbox + webhook-inbox (mirrors spec-128 bank pattern + notification_outbox). **Open decision surfaced to operator:** ship a MANUAL proof-of-delivery uploader near-term (independent of Lalamove, forward-compatible) vs wait and land both with the courier integration. **Next:** U2b (desktop grid PO grouping); U3 (within-ticket split, GATED on ADR); U4 (proof/dispatch, blocked on Lalamove creds).

## Spec 134 U4a-i - PO-attachment purpose discriminator (migration) (2026-06-17)

Status: SCHEMA MIGRATION ‚Äî on branch `feat/spec134-u4a-po-attachment-purpose`, **awaiting operator PR + merge + `db:push`** (change-management gate; NOT merge-auto ‚Äî the risky/schema exception). Operator chose (2026-06-17) a MANUAL proof-of-delivery uploader near-term ("upload first", before U2b). `purchase_order_attachments` (spec 125) is deliberately single-purpose, so a distinct proof category needs schema. **Migration** `20260713000000_po_attachment_purpose.sql`: new `purchase_order_attachment_purpose` enum (`source_document` default + `proof_of_delivery`) ‚Äî a FRESH `create type` (not `alter type add value`), so its labels are usable in the same migration (the 20260622000100 hazard doesn't apply); `purpose` column added NOT NULL DEFAULT `source_document` (existing rows + the create-PO source-doc INSERT path keep working with no code change); column-scoped `grant insert (purpose)` so app sessions can set it (ADR 0038); the existing back-office INSERT policy is unchanged (it doesn't constrain the purpose column ‚Äî proof upload is the same back-office/site gate); `purchase_order_attachments_current` view recreated to carry `purpose` (security_invoker + ADR 0009/0015 anti-join preserved). **pgTAP** file 50 extended 23‚Üí29 (enum labels, table+view column, default-to-source_document behavioral check, proof_of_delivery insert + view surfaces it) ‚Äî runs post-apply. **App unchanged** (typecheck/lint/963 unit stay green from f716605). **Next after apply:** `db:types` regen (will add `purpose` to the generated types app+worker), then **U4a-ii** = `ProofOfDeliveryUploader` on the PO detail (mirror InvoiceUploader, writes purpose='proof_of_delivery' to po-attachments) + `addProofOfDeliveryAttachment` action + a ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á display section. The Lalamove auto-POD (U4b, blocked on creds) fans into the SAME purpose.

## Spec 134 U4a-ii - Manual proof-of-delivery uploader (UI) (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only** (the U4a-i migration `20260713000000_po_attachment_purpose` was merged + `db:push`ed to prod this session; `db:test` 59 files / 1256 assertions / 0 failures; `db:types` regenerated app+worker, committed e670b7b). typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **963 unit** ¬∑ all green. Completes the operator-chosen ("upload first") manual proof-of-delivery slot. **Action** `addProofOfDeliveryAttachment` (requests/actions.ts) ‚Äî mirrors `addPurchaseOrderAttachment` but stamps `purpose='proof_of_delivery'`; same po-attachments bucket + path + back-office INSERT policy + idempotent 23505 replay. **Component** `ProofOfDeliveryUploader` (mirrors InvoiceUploader: prepare/downscale or raw PDF ‚Üí direct upload to po-attachments at {po_id}/{att}.{ext} ‚Üí action ‚Üí refresh). **PO detail (U1 page)** gains a "ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á" section: reads `purchase_order_attachments_current` filtered `purpose='proof_of_delivery'`, signs URLs (private bucket, service-role), renders image lightbox group + PDF iframes + the uploader (shown to all PO-detail viewers = the insert-policy role set; RLS re-enforces). **Leak fix:** the ticket-detail source-doc query (`ýπÄý∏≠ý∏Åý∏™ý∏≤ý∏£ýπÉý∏öý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠`) now filters `purpose='source_document'` so proof rows never show there. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page + storage ‚Üí no preview; matches how InvoiceUploader/addPurchaseOrderAttachment shipped; pgTAP file 50 covers the schema). **U4a feature-complete.** Lalamove auto-POD (U4b, blocked on creds) will fan into this same `proof_of_delivery` purpose. **Next:** U2b (desktop grid PO grouping); U3 (within-ticket split, ADR-gated).

Status: COMPLETE ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only.** typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **963 unit** ¬∑ all green. Finishes U2 (U2a was the phone cards): the desktop ProcurementGrid ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á band now renders a **PO header row** before each bundled order's members, linking to the PO detail (U1). **Page:** the in_transit gridGroups items are pre-ordered via `groupByPurchaseOrder` so each PO's members are contiguous (PO groups first-appearance, then loose) ‚Äî `flattenRecordOrder`/prev-next drawer nav follows this visual order with no extra change; `purchase_order_id` added to the `ProcurementGridRecord` mapping; a serializable `poFacts` record (poNumber/supplier/derived status/lineCount, reusing the phone roll-up) passed to the grid. **Grid:** `PoHeaderRow` (Package icon ¬∑ PO-#### ¬∑ supplier ¬∑ status pill ¬∑ N ý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ ¬∑ chevron; one `<Link>` to /requests/orders/[poId], NOT a drawer-opening record); inserted in `BandRows` only for the in_transit band when a row's `purchase_order_id` differs from the previous row's (contiguity guaranteed by the pre-order). Other bands + selection/checkbox (to_order only) untouched. **Fixtures:** `purchase_order_id: null` added to the three `ProcurementGridRecord` factories (grid-preview page + procurement-grid-health + phone-po-basket tests). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated procurement page ‚Üí no preview; the pure `groupByPurchaseOrder` + roll-up carry the tests; /grid-preview fixtures carry no PO so headers don't render there). **U2 feature-complete (phone + desktop).** **Next:** U3 (within-ticket split, ADR-gated); U4b (Lalamove auto-POD, blocked on creds).

## Spec 134 U3 - Within-ticket partial delivery via split-on-receipt (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0052 accepted). Migration `20260714000000_purchase_request_partial_split` merged + `db:push`ed (dry-run clean); `db:test` **60 files / 1280 assertions / 0 failures** (new file 60 = 24); `db:types` regenerated app+worker (commit 7291dd8). The 1‚Äì2% within-ticket case. **Schema:** `split_from_request_id` lineage column (RPC-only by the column-scoped grant posture, ADR 0038) + `split_purchase_request_on_receipt(p_request_id, p_received_qty, p_received_by?, p_delivery_note?, p_delivered_amount?)` SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Splits an in-transit PO member into a delivered portion (the ORIGINAL, reduced ‚Äî sets delivered_at so the existing derive trigger flips it to `delivered` + the audit trigger logs delivery) + a REMAINING child (new row, on_route, same PO, `split_from_request_id`=original, pr_number from the sequence default). Guards: back-office, in-transit member (purchased/on_route), `0<received<ordered`, delivered-amount range. **Amount (ADR 0052 ¬ß4, operator: proportional default + buyer-editable):** omit `p_delivered_amount` ‚Üí `round(amount√óreceived/ordered,2)`; supply ‚Üí buyer value; remainder = original ‚àí delivered (family sum = original exactly, per-WP spend preserved). One split audit row (action 'update', ADR 0027/0031 no-new-enum precedent). **UI (U3-ii):** `splitPurchaseRequestOnReceipt` action (relays the RPC) + `PartialReceiveControl` (a "ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏öý∏≤ý∏áý∏™ýπàý∏ßý∏ô" expander on each in-transit PO-detail line ‚Äî qty + editable proportional-prefill amount [back office only] + note); after submit the PO badge becomes `partially_received` via the roll-up (no new derive/display logic ‚Äî the split yields ordinary tickets). **Verified-by-checklist** for the UI (auth-gated; the RPC carries the pgTAP). **Spec 134 partial-delivery story (U1 detail ¬∑ U2 a+b grouping ¬∑ U3 split ¬∑ U4a proof) is COMPLETE on prod.** Only U4b (Lalamove auto-POD) remains, blocked on sandbox creds.

## Spec 134 U5 - PO-level receive flow + demote within-ticket partial (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0053). Migration `20260715000000_receive_po_lines` merged + db:push'd (dry-run clean); db:test **61 files / 1290 / 0** (new file 61 = 10); db:types reconciled (1f50e47). **Reframes the receiving UX to the operator's real delivery distribution** (A ~85% whole PO ¬∑ B ~14% whole-ticket subset waiting on restock ¬∑ C ~1% within-ticket made-to-order) ‚Äî the photo-per-ticket model made A/B tedious while U3's ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏öý∏≤ý∏áý∏™ýπàý∏ßý∏ô was the loud control; now inverted. **Migration:** `receive_po_lines(p_request_ids uuid[], p_received_by?, p_delivery_note?)` SECURITY DEFINER RPC ‚Äî back-office gate, in-transit-only (`status in purchased/on_route`), all-or-nothing; sets delivered_at+received_by+delivery_note ‚Üí the existing derive trigger flips status to delivered + the audit trigger logs each line (standard `purchase_request_delivery` rows). No new column; spec-24 photo path + the roll-up unchanged. **UI:** `receivePoLines` action; `PoReceiveSection` (the PO detail's prominent "ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á" checklist ‚Äî every in-transit line **ticked by default** = Case A one tap; untick the waiting lines = Case B subset, the rest stay on_route ‚Üí PO `partially_received` via roll-up); the within-ticket split (U3) **demoted** to a quiet "ýπÅý∏öýπàý∏áý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏öý∏≤ý∏áý∏™ýπàý∏ßý∏ô" link per line via a new `subtle`/`triggerLabel` prop on `PartialReceiveControl` (Case C). The static "ý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ýπÉý∏ôýπÉý∏öý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠" list stays as read-only PO contents. **Delivery cost** ("sometimes paid, sometimes free") deferred to U4b/courier (operator). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated; RPC carries the pgTAP). **Spec 134 now: U1¬∑U2¬∑U3¬∑U4a¬∑U5 on prod; only U4b (Lalamove) parked on creds.**

## Spec 134 U6 - PO progress stepper + delivering (in_transit) roll-up state (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only** (pure helper + labels + a presentational component; no schema). typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **969 unit** (+6) ¬∑ green. Closes two operator-reported gaps on the PO detail: (1) no progress tracker; (2) delivery felt missing ‚Äî the PO jumped ordered ‚Üí received because the roll-up folded `on_route` into "ordered". **Roll-up (amends ADR 0044 ¬ß5):** `PurchaseOrderStatus` gains `in_transit` (ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á); `derivePurchaseOrderStatus` returns it when ‚â•1 active member is `on_route` and none delivered yet (between `ordered` = all purchased/none shipped, and `partially_received`). Label `ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á` + pill SKY (the per-ticket on_route hue; partially_received also SKY, label disambiguates). **Stepper:** new pure `purchaseOrderStageStates(status)` ‚Üí 3 stages [ordered, in_transit, received] each done/current/pending (+ partial flag on received for partially_received); `PurchaseOrderTracker` (server-safe, mirrors the spec-22 per-ticket tracker geometry) renders ý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ ‚Üí ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á ‚Üí ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á on the PO detail summary card. So the delivering stage is always visible as a milestone (even when shipment-recording is skipped, ADR 0027) and shows live (sky/ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á) once `record_shipment` fires. TDD: derive on_route cases flipped ordered‚Üíin_transit + stageStates tests first; i18n + status-colors PO_STATES extended. List surfaces (phone PO card, desktop PO header) inherit the new label/pill automatically. **Verified-by-checklist** for the page render (auth-gated; pure helpers carry the tests).

## Spec 134 U7-ii - PO delivery breakdown UI (ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á) (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only** (U7-i migration `20260716000000_delivery_batch_id` already merged + db:push'd this session: column + receive_po_lines/split stamping; db:test **61 files / 1293 / 0**; db:types 3e13abd). Answers the operator's "what if partial delivery branches the tracker?" ‚Äî chosen render = breakdown list under the stepper (not a literal fork-tree), batches grouped by `delivery_batch_id`. **Pure helper** `src/lib/purchasing/delivery-batches.ts` `groupDeliveryBatches(lines)` ‚Üí `{batches[] (by delivery_batch_id, fallback delivered_at, oldest first), pending {count, earliestEta} | null}`, excludes rejected/cancelled (6 unit tests, TDD). **Component** `PoDeliveryBreakdown` (server-safe): "ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á" ‚Äî ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏óý∏µýπà N ¬∑ count ¬∑ ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß <date> ‚úì rows + a ý∏Ñýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏™ýπàý∏á ¬∑ count ¬∑ ý∏Ñý∏≤ý∏î <eta> ‚è≥ row (lucide Check/Clock). **PO detail:** members select += `delivery_batch_id`; rendered under `PurchaseOrderTracker` **only when the PO forked** (`batches.length > 1 || pending`), so the 85% one-delivery PO keeps just the linear stepper. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated; helper carries the tests). **Spec 134 = U1¬∑U2¬∑U3¬∑U4a¬∑U5¬∑U6¬∑U7 on prod;** only U4b (Lalamove auto-POD + per-delivery cost) parked on creds ‚Äî `delivery_batch_id` is its bridge (a courier order = one batch).

## Spec 134 U8 - Receiving is a site action (drop procurement from the receive gate) (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17. Operator insight: the purchase team is off-site and only knows the planned delivery (ETA); actual receipt must be confirmed by people on site. Discovery: the spec-23/ADR-0028 delivery-confirmation PHOTO path ALREADY gated to (site_admin, project_manager, super_admin) ‚Äî procurement was never allowed there; the U5 `receive_po_lines` + U3 `split_purchase_request_on_receipt` RPCs were the outliers (allowed back-office incl procurement). **Migration** `20260717000000_receive_site_only` CREATE OR REPLACE both RPCs with the role gate narrowed to the site set (bodies otherwise identical ‚Üí same signatures ‚Üí db:types a no-op, confirmed zero drift). **UI:** PO detail computes `canReceive = SITE_STAFF_ROLES.includes(ctx.role)`; `PoReceiveSection` (and the nested ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏öý∏≤ý∏áý∏™ýπàý∏ßý∏ô split) render only when canReceive ‚Äî procurement still sees the PO, tracker, delivery breakdown + lines read-only, no ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á controls. **pgTAP:** file 61 (+1) + file 60 (+1) assert procurement is refused (42501) ‚Äî **61 files / 1295 / 0**. typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **975 unit** green. The proof-of-delivery uploader (U4a) stays back-office for now (it's evidence, not the receive-status action) ‚Äî possible follow-up if proof should also be site-only. **Spec 134 = U1¬∑U2¬∑U3¬∑U4a¬∑U5¬∑U6¬∑U7¬∑U8 on prod;** only U4b (Lalamove auto-POD + per-delivery cost) parked on creds.

## Spec 134 U9 - Consolidated ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á (Delivery) section on the PO detail (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only refactor** (no schema). typecheck ¬∑ lint ¬∑ **975 unit** ¬∑ green. Fixes the operator's "on a PO screen there's nothing about Delivery, only ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á" ‚Äî delivery was scattered (ETA labeled ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏´ý∏ôý∏îý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á in the summary; the ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á stepper dot; the ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á batch breakdown hidden unless forked; the proof section MISLABELED ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á though it's the `proof_of_delivery` doc procurement attaches). Per the settled model (procurement owns delivery, site owns ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á), consolidated all delivery into ONE **ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á** block. **New** `PoDeliverySection` (server-safe): heading ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á ‚Üí ETA/status line (ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏´ý∏ôý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á <date> / ý∏™ýπàý∏áý∏Ñý∏£ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß / ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏´ý∏ôý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á) ‚Üí the ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á **branch breakdown** when the PO forked (ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏óý∏µýπà N ¬∑ count ¬∑ ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß <date> ‚úì + ý∏Ñýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏™ýπàý∏á ¬∑ count ¬∑ ý∏Ñý∏≤ý∏î <eta> ‚è≥) ‚Üí **ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á** (the proof_of_delivery gallery + uploader, procurement attaches). **Page:** removed the summary ETA line, the standalone breakdown render, and the inline ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á section; renders `<PoDeliverySection>` after the tracker, before the ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á checklist; deleted the now-orphaned `po-delivery-breakdown.tsx` (inlined). Order: summary+tracker ‚Üí **ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á** (delivery home: ETA ¬∑ branches ¬∑ proof) ‚Üí **ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á** (site receive action, U8-gated) ‚Üí line list. `ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á` stays the site's action; ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á is procurement's delivery view. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated; groupDeliveryBatches carries the tests). **Spec 134 = U1‚ÄìU9 on prod;** only U4b (Lalamove) parked on creds.

## Spec 135 U1 - First-class deliveries: data layer + auto-create + backfill (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0054). Migrations `20260718000000_purchase_order_deliveries` merged + db:push'd (dry-run clean); db:test **62 files / 1309 / 0** (new file 62 = 14, incl the backfill invariant on real data); db:types reconciled (61eb1cf); app typecheck clean (additive ‚Äî no app code touches deliveries yet). **Additive by design** ‚Äî leaves U7 `delivery_batch_id` + the receive/split RPCs untouched so the U9 reads keep working until U2. **Table** `purchase_order_deliveries` (po_id, eta, note, cost [money/back-office], carrier [future Lalamove], created_by) + RLS (back-office SELECT mirroring purchase_orders; NO direct write ‚Äî RPC-only, ADR 0038) + `purchase_requests.delivery_id` FK (column-scope grant excludes it ‚Üí RPC-only). **Auto-create:** `create_purchase_order` (CREATE OR REPLACE of the 20260701000300 body + the delivery block; same 5-arg signature) now inserts the default delivery (= whole PO) and stamps every member line's `delivery_id` ‚Üí every PO has ‚â•1 delivery, the 85% never touch it. **Backfill** (DO block): one delivery per (PO, delivery_batch_id) group + the default/remainder; pgTAP proves no PO-member line is left without a delivery. **Verified-by-pgTAP** (no app/UI change in U1). **Next:** U2 = ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á section renders the deliveries list (switch the app off delivery_batch_id ‚Üí delivery_id); U3 procurement split-delivery UI; U4 per-delivery proof. Spec 134 U5/U7/U9 will re-point at deliveries; delivery_batch_id retired in a later migration once the app is off it.

## Spec 135 U2 - ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á renders the deliveries list; split inherits its delivery (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0054). Migration `20260719000000_split_inherits_delivery` merged + db:push'd (dry-run clean); db:test **62 files / 1310 / 0** (file 60 now 27 ‚Äî the inherit assertion; backfill invariant still 0). The PO detail now reads the real `purchase_order_deliveries` (U1) instead of the U7 receipt-batch grouping. **App:** pure `buildDeliveriesView(deliveries, lines)` ‚Üí per-delivery {ordinal ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏óý∏µýπà N (by created_at), eta, derived status (reuse derivePurchaseOrderStatus over the delivery's lines), active lineCount, latest receivedAt} (5 unit tests, TDD); `PoDeliverySection` renders ONE delivery (the 85% default) as a calm status line and MULTIPLE as the ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á list (ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏óý∏µýπà N ¬∑ status pill ¬∑ eta ¬∑ count ¬∑ receipt ‚úì). Page reads `purchase_order_deliveries` + groups members by `delivery_id` (was delivery_batch_id); **deleted** `groupDeliveryBatches` + its test (replaced). **Correctness migration:** the within-ticket split (U3) left its remainder child with `delivery_id` NULL after U1 (orphan); now the child INHERITS `v_orig.delivery_id` (ADR 0054 ¬ß7) ‚Äî file 60 proves it. cost deferred to U3 (money). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page; helper + RPC carry tests). delivery_batch_id is now app-dead (still written vestigially by receive/split; retired in a later migration). **Next:** U3 procurement split-delivery UI (sheet: select lines + eta + cost) + RPC; U4 per-delivery proof.

## Spec 135 U3 - Procurement split-delivery UI + guarded RPC (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0054). Migrations `20260720000000_split_po_delivery` + fix-forward `20260720000100_split_po_delivery_fix_lock` merged + db:push'd (dry-run clean); db:test **63 files / 1326 / 0** (new file 63 = 16); db:types zero drift (CREATE OR REPLACE, same signature). lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **979 unit** (incl. 5 new TDD) ¬∑ green. **Caught by pgTAP:** the first RPC used `count(*) ‚Ä¶ FOR UPDATE`, which Postgres rejects (0A000) ‚Äî every real split errored; fix-forward locks the selected rows in a separate `PERFORM ‚Ä¶ FOR UPDATE` then counts.

## Spec 135 U4 - Per-delivery proof of delivery (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0054). Migration `20260721000000_po_attachment_delivery_id` merged + db:push'd (dry-run clean); db:test **63 files / 1331 / 0** (file 50 now 34, +5: delivery_id col + view col + FK violation + back-office insert + view surfaces); db:types reconciled (the two delivery_id FK Relationships entries, app+worker). lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **984 unit** (+5 new TDD) ¬∑ green. **Closes the spec 135 deliveries arc.** A proof-of-delivery (signed note / received-goods photo) now belongs to the **delivery (ý∏áý∏ßý∏î)** it documents, not the whole PO. **Migration** (mirrors the 20260713000000 purpose migration): `purchase_order_attachments.delivery_id` nullable FK ‚Üí `purchase_order_deliveries(id)` + index + `grant insert(delivery_id)` (ADR 0038 column-scope) + recreate `purchase_order_attachments_current` to carry it. **NO backfill** ‚Äî the table is append-only (the block-write trigger rejects UPDATE), so legacy proof (`delivery_id` NULL) surfaces under the PO's **default** (earliest, ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏óý∏µýπà 1) delivery via the app helper, not a data migration. **App:** `addProofOfDeliveryAttachment` now takes a `deliveryId`, **validated to belong to the PO** (server-side read under RLS) before insert, and stamps it; `ProofOfDeliveryUploader` carries `deliveryId`; pure `groupProofByDelivery(docs, defaultDeliveryId)` (5 unit tests, TDD) maps each doc to its delivery (NULL ‚Üí default); `PoDeliverySection` renders proof **per delivery** ‚Äî one block for the 85% single-delivery default (unchanged feel), a per-ý∏áý∏ßý∏î block (heading "ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏óý∏µýπà N ¬∑ ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á" + its own uploader) when the PO is split. Page query adds `delivery_id`, groups, passes `proofByDelivery`. The delivery-belongs-to-PO RLS with-check left as a possible follow-up (action enforces it; the INSERT policy is unchanged, mirroring the purpose migration's minimalism). **Verified-by-checklist** for the UI (auth-gated; helper + pgTAP carry tests). **Spec 135 = U1¬∑U2¬∑U3¬∑U4 on prod;** only U4b (Lalamove auto-POD + per-delivery cost) parked on sandbox creds ‚Äî the delivery entity + per-delivery proof/cost are its join point.

## Spec 135 U5 - Delivery detail page; ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á = one action (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0054). **App/nav only ‚Äî no migration** (reuses U4's `delivery_id`); no db:push. lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **988 unit** (+3 new TDD) ¬∑ green. **Operator UX:** the ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á section had **two** buttons (ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á + ýπÅý∏ôý∏öý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ô per delivery, multiplied per ý∏áý∏ßý∏î after U4). Consolidated to one. **New route** `src/app/requests/orders/[poId]/deliveries/[deliveryId]/page.tsx` ‚Äî a delivery detail page (PURCHASING_ROLES gate, uuid-guard + notFound, delivery must belong to the PO): ý∏áý∏ßý∏î summary (derived status pill via buildDeliveriesView ¬∑ eta ¬∑ cost [back-office display gate, money] ¬∑ note), its member lines (link to the PR), and **ý∏´ý∏•ý∏±ý∏Åý∏êý∏≤ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á** (the U4 gallery + uploader, scoped to this delivery; legacy NULL proof under the default ý∏áý∏ßý∏î via groupProofByDelivery). **`PoDeliverySection` redesign:** every delivery row is now a **Link** to its detail page (chevron affordance; single + multi alike), the inline proof block is **removed**, only the ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á button stays ‚Üí one action. **PO detail page:** dropped the proof query + mintSignedUrls + groupProofByDelivery + the proof props (proof now lives on the delivery page). **New nav SSOT** `src/lib/nav/order-paths.ts` ‚Äî `poDetailHref` / `deliveryDetailHref` (3 unit tests, TDD; mirrors project-paths). **Extracted** `DeliveryProofBlock` to its own component (off po-delivery-section, used by the detail page). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated pages; nav helper carries the test). **Spec 135 = U1¬∑U2¬∑U3¬∑U4¬∑U5 on prod;** only U4b parked on creds.

## Spec 135 U6 - Delivery dispatch + branching tracker + date fix (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17 (ADR 0054). Migration `20260722000000_dispatch_po_delivery` merged + db:push'd (dry-run clean); db:test **64 files / 1341 / 0** (new file 64 = 10); db:types zero drift. lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **988 unit** ¬∑ green. **From the operator's device test (3 findings):** (a) **date overflow** ‚Äî the split-sheet eta `<input type="date">` overflowed on iOS; added `min-w-0 appearance-none` (the purchase-record-form pattern). (b) **stuck at ý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß** ‚Äî `on_route` (‚Üí in_transit / ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á) was only reachable via the per-ticket `record_shipment` (buried on the PR detail); the operator at the delivery level had no path. **New RPC `dispatch_purchase_order_delivery(p_delivery_id)`** (back-office gate, mirrors record_shipment: sets the ý∏áý∏ßý∏î's `purchased` lines' `shipped_at` ‚Üí the existing on_route derive + audit trigger chain flips them, **no new trigger**; returns the count, re-dispatch = 0-row no-op) + `dispatchPurchaseOrderDelivery` action + `DeliveryDispatchControl` "ý∏öý∏±ý∏ôý∏óý∏∂ý∏Åý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á" button on the delivery detail page (back-office, shown when the ý∏áý∏ßý∏î has purchased lines). (c) **tracker didn't branch** ‚Äî `PoDeliveriesTracker` renders a per-ý∏áý∏ßý∏î `PurchaseOrderTracker` (each its own ý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠‚Üíý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á‚Üíý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á from its derived status, left-ruled) on the PO detail when `deliveries.length > 1`; single-delivery keeps the one linear tracker. **Verified-by-checklist** for button/tracker/date (auth-gated; RPC carries the pgTAP). **Spec 135 = U1¬∑U2¬∑U3¬∑U4¬∑U5¬∑U6 on prod;** only U4b (Lalamove auto-dispatch ‚Äî fills the same on_route transition automatically) parked on creds. Procurement plans a PO's deliveries (ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á): the explicit split for the multi-delivery 15% ‚Äî the U1 default delivery keeps the 85% one-tap. **Migration `20260720000000_split_po_delivery`:** new `split_purchase_order_delivery(p_purchase_order_id, p_request_ids uuid[], p_eta?, p_note?, p_cost?)` SECURITY DEFINER RPC (the only writer of `purchase_order_deliveries` + `delivery_id` besides create_purchase_order, ADR 0038). Creates a NEW delivery carrying eta/note/cost and repoints the selected lines' `delivery_id`. **Gate:** back office (project_manager/procurement/super_admin) ‚Äî **NOT site_admin** (a delivery is procurement's PLAN, not a ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öý∏Çý∏≠ý∏á receive action, U8). **Guards:** every selected id is a distinct in-transit (`purchased`/`on_route`) member of the PO (one count check catches non-member, delivered/rejected/cancelled, and dup ids); no **source delivery emptied** ‚Äî each touched delivery keeps ‚â•1 active line (a delivered line counts, so it keeps a source alive after all its in-transit lines move); cost ‚â• 0. One split audit row (action `update`, target `purchase_order_deliveries`, payload `transition:['delivery_split']` ‚Äî ADR 0027/0031 no-new-enum precedent). **App:** `splitPurchaseOrderDelivery` action (relays the RPC); pure `deliverySplitWouldEmptySource(selected, activeCountByDelivery)` (5 unit tests, TDD) mirrors the non-empty guard for a clear inline message; `SplitDeliveryControl` client component ‚Äî a "ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á" trigger ‚Üí BottomSheet (spec 78): line checkboxes + ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏´ý∏ôý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á (date) + ý∏Ñýπàý∏≤ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á (money) + ý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤ý∏¢ýπÄý∏´ý∏ïý∏∏ ‚Üí submit. `PoDeliverySection` renders the trigger only when back office AND some delivery still holds ‚â•2 active lines (a split is possible); page passes `splittableLines` (in-transit members) + `activeCountByDelivery`. **Verified-by-checklist** for the UI (auth-gated; RPC carries the pgTAP). cost now lands (the U2 deferral). **UX refinement (2026-06-17, operator):** the split sheet opens with **all lines pre-ticked** (most deliveries carry the whole order ‚Äî untick only the items going to another ý∏áý∏ßý∏î), re-seeded on every open; a proactive "ý∏ïýπâý∏≠ý∏áýπÄý∏´ý∏•ý∏∑ý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏¢ýπàý∏≤ý∏áý∏ôýπâý∏≠ý∏¢ 1 ý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ýπÑý∏ßýπâý∏≠ý∏µý∏Åý∏áý∏ßý∏î" hint replaces the silently-disabled submit when all are still ticked (can't move the whole source out). **Next:** U4 per-delivery proof (`purchase_order_attachments.delivery_id`; scope the POD uploader/gallery to a delivery).

## Spec 136 - Create a purchase request on the WP page only (+ PM self-approve) (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only, no migration** (self-approval already works at the data layer); no db:push. lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **988 unit** ¬∑ green. **Operator:** "the ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ section on the ý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ (/requests) tab should be removed ‚Äî we don't allow users to make a request there anyway." **Removed** the ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ section from `/requests` + the now-dead `?wp=` machinery (pinned-WP resolution, the spec-12 contextual back-bar, the `?wp=`-preserving filter-chip hrefs, the unused imports). `/requests` is purely the worklist now. **Catch found via grep:** the PM **review** WP page (`/review/work-packages/[id]`) created a request by a cross-tab "ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ ‚Üí" link INTO that section (the only live entry); the SA project WP page already creates inline (spec 29). So **moved PM creation inline** ‚Äî replaced the link with the shared `PurchaseRequestForm` in a `<details>` (mirrors the project WP page). `/requests?wp=` is fully dead now. **PM self-approve (operator ask):** `PurchaseRequestForm` gains `canSelfApprove` (PM/super) ‚Üí the submit becomes **"ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áýπÅý∏•ý∏∞ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥"**, which after create (+ attachment flush) chains `decidePurchaseRequest(approved)` so a PM-raised request is approved in one tap (a PM is the approver). SA keeps the plain "ý∏™ýπàý∏áý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠". **No migration:** `decidePurchaseRequest` is a user-session UPDATE gated only by `status='requested'` ‚Äî no requester‚âÝapprover guard, so self-approval already works (approved_by + the audit trigger record the actor). Confirmation reads "ý∏öý∏±ý∏ôý∏óý∏∂ý∏ÅýπÅý∏•ý∏∞ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥ýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß"; if the approve leg fails the request stays pending (approvable from the worklist) and an inline note says so. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated pages; the form-render unit test still passes). Acceptance owed: raise a request from a WP as SA ‚Üí pending; as PM ‚Üí "ý∏™ý∏£ýπâý∏≤ý∏áýπÅý∏•ý∏∞ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥" ‚Üí approved; /requests shows no create section.

## Spec 137 - Action-state bands + view filter on the site /requests worklist (2026-06-17)

Status: COMPLETE on prod ‚Äî 2026-06-17. **App-only, no migration**; no db:push. lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **995 unit** (+7 new TDD) ¬∑ green. **Operator:** site people need more than ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏´ý∏°ý∏î/ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏áý∏âý∏±ý∏ô, the flat sort "is not intuitive", and "at the very least be able to filter out items received." (I recommended + built; aligns with the locked SA action-state lens, [[worklist-priority-alignment]].) The non-procurement `/requests` view (SA/PM/super) was a flat list (pending by priority, then everything newest-first) + a ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏´ý∏°ý∏î/ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏áý∏âý∏±ý∏ô toggle. **Pure helper** `src/lib/purchasing/request-bands.ts` (7 unit tests, TDD): `requestBand(status)` ‚Üí action-state band; `groupRequestsByBand(rows, view)` ‚Üí ordered non-empty bands **ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥** (requested) ‚Üí **ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥ýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠** (approved) ‚Üí **ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á** (purchased/on_route) ‚Üí **ýπÄý∏™ý∏£ýπáý∏àýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß** (delivered/site_purchased) ‚Üí **ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥/ý∏¢ý∏ÅýπÄý∏•ý∏¥ý∏Å** (rejected/cancelled), active bands sorted priority-then-oldest (`comparePendingRequests`), done/closed newest-first; `RequestView` active(default)/done/all with `VIEW_BANDS` ‚Äî **active HIDES received+closed** (the operator's minimum). **Page:** `?view=` (default active); the non-procurement filter row is now a **view segmented control** (ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏îý∏≥ýπÄý∏ôý∏¥ý∏ôý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£/ýπÄý∏™ý∏£ýπáý∏àýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß/ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏´ý∏°ý∏î) + a **ýπÄý∏âý∏ûý∏≤ý∏∞ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏áý∏âý∏±ý∏ô** toggle (replaces the old ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏´ý∏°ý∏î/ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏áý∏âý∏±ý∏ô 2-chip; each preserves the other axis via `reqHref`, defaults omitted from the URL); the list renders as **band sections** (heading + count + cards), 3-way empty state (no requests / none in this view / bands). No new query (bands computed over the already-fetched pending+decided rows). **Procurement view unchanged** (keeps its spec-104 pipeline + spec-110 filters). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated; the band helper carries the tests). Spec doc `137-site-worklist-bands.md`. Acceptance owed: site sees grouped bands, default hides received, view chips + ýπÄý∏âý∏ûý∏≤ý∏∞ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏áý∏âý∏±ý∏ô work. **Consistency refinement (2026-06-17, operator: "check UI, not the same as the other side; think hard what users want to know"):** the site bands now match the procurement pipeline's section styling ‚Äî `hot` band (amber heading + amber count chip) where the site's attention band = **ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏•ý∏±ý∏áý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏™ýπàý∏á** (incoming = what site receives, the analogue of procurement's buy-now band). And the thing site most wants to know ‚Äî **is anything late** ‚Äî surfaces as a `ýπÄý∏•ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≥ý∏´ý∏ôý∏î N` danger chip on a band with overdue arrivals (`groupRequestsByBand(rows, view, today)` counts items whose `eta` < today; +3 unit tests, 998 total). The shared `PurchaseRequestCard` already carries ETA/tracker/status per row.

## Spec 95 (hardening) - iOS keyboard-freeze: scroll-independent repaint for short forms (2026-06-17)

Status: code COMPLETE, **NOT device-verified** (desktop preview cannot reproduce the WebKit/iOS-PWA quirk ‚Äî operator must confirm on a real iOS PWA, especially a SHORT form). **App-only, no migration.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **999 unit** ¬∑ green. **Operator: "fix the frozen screen after closing the keyboard for good."** Recurrence #2 of the spec-95 blank-after-keyboard glitch (recurrence #1 = the still-focused-field case, fixed 436ee6f). **Root cause:** every `ViewportScrollGuard.repaintScroller` path forced the repaint via `scroller.scrollBy(0,1)` ‚Äî which only repaints when `<main>` can actually scroll. A form that fits the viewport (no overflow) can't scroll ‚Üí scrollBy moves nothing ‚Üí the locked scroller (spec 64: body overflow:hidden, `<main>` the only scroller) stays blank.
