Closes the lifecycle-audit gap "complete is terminal" ‚Äî operator: "complete doesn't mean defect-free." **Model (operator-chosen):** reopen to a new `rework` WP status (not reuse in_progress, not a punch-list entity); `complete ‚Üí rework ‚Üí re-capture After ‚Üí pending_approval ‚Üí complete`. **Reportable by site_admin + PM/super** (field finds defects; PM re-approves). **Migrations:** `rework` added to `work_package_status` in its OWN migration (PG: can't use a new enum value in the tx that adds it; `add value if not exists`), then `reopen_work_package_for_defect(p_wp,p_reason)` ‚Äî SECURITY DEFINER, role-gated (sa/pm/super) + membership-gated (`can_see_wp`, ADR 0056), complete-only, flips to `rework` + writes an `audit_log` row (`action='other'`, payload `{event:'wp_reopened_for_defect',reason}`, actor captured); non-complete/empty-reason‚Üí22023, wrong-role/non-member‚Üí42501. **Transition wiring:** `TRANSITIONABLE_FROM_STATUSES` += `rework` (after-photo from rework ‚Üí pending_approval); labor already allowed in rework (log_labor_day blocks only complete); list-filter "outstanding" shows rework automatically; cost re-freezes on re-approve (existing path). **Enum-add ripple ‚Äî all consumers handled, typecheck-surfaced (the safety net):** `WORK_PACKAGE_STATUS_LABEL` (ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ôýπÅý∏ÅýπâýπÑý∏Ç), `workPackageStatusPillClasses` (amber), `deriveActionBand` (rework‚Üítodo) + `nextAction` (capture), `schedule-gantt` `STATUS_STYLE` (amber, pct 90; this one was caught only by typecheck ‚Äî a Record the grep would've missed). **pgTAP file 75** (plan 10) + enum pin (file 08) ‚Üí six values. **Verified-by-checklist** (pure transition predicate unit-tested; RPC pgTAP'd; UI is U2). **Next:** U2 ‚Äî the "report defect" control on the WP page (complete-only, SA/PM/super) ‚Üí reopen + show the rework status + reason from the latest audit row.

## Spec 144 U2 ‚Äî report-defect UI (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-18. SPEC 144 COMPLETE.** App-only, **no migration** (reuses U1's `reopen_work_package_for_defect` RPC). lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **1100 unit (162 files; +3 TDD: report-defect-control)** ¬∑ green. Makes the reopen path operable on the WP detail page. **Shipped:** (1) `reportDefect({projectId, workPackageId, reason})` action appended to the WP actions file ‚Äî validates reason (‚â§1000), calls the RPC under the user session (the SECURITY DEFINER RPC carries role+membership+complete-only), maps 42501‚Üí"ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏°ý∏µý∏™ý∏¥ý∏óý∏òý∏¥ýπå (ý∏ïýπâý∏≠ý∏áýπÄý∏õýπáý∏ôý∏óý∏µý∏°ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô)" / 22023‚Üí"ýπÄý∏âý∏ûý∏≤ý∏∞ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ôý∏óý∏µýπàýπÄý∏™ý∏£ýπáý∏àýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß", revalidates the WP + project paths; (2) `ReportDefectControl` ('use client', reuses `BottomSheet`: reason textarea ‚Üí action ‚Üí router.refresh, inline error); (3) WP page wiring ‚Äî when `status='complete'` show the report-defect button (all WP-page viewers are SA/PM/super; the RPC re-gates membership), when `status='rework'` show an amber `AttentionCard` with the latest defect reason (fetched from the newest `wp_reopened_for_defect` audit_log row via `payload->>event` filter). From rework, the existing capture‚Üíapprove cycle resumes (after-photo‚Üípending_approval wired in U1; cost re-freezes on re-approve). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page ‚Üí /login in preview; the 3 component tests cover submit-gate/success-refresh/error; the RPC is pgTAP'd in file 75; operator on-device = acceptance). **SPEC 144 COMPLETE (U1 DB + U2 UI): a defect on a completed WP now reopens it to `rework`, captures the reason, and flows back through capture ‚Üí re-approval ‚Üí complete.** Closes the lifecycle-audit "complete is terminal" gap.

## Spec 145 ‚Äî lock new work on a completed project (warranty-aware) (2026-06-18)

Status: **SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-18.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **1100 unit** ¬∑ green; **full pgTAP suite 76 files / 1521 asserts, 0 failures** post-push; `db:push` applied `20260735000000`; `db:types` reconciled. Operator decision: a project locks once completed ‚Äî **caveat:** completion ‚âÝ full closure (client retains a warranty %, Buildall 5% for a year; defects surface in that window), so the lock blocks NEW work but must NOT block warranty defect-rework. **Enforcement = a `BEFORE INSERT` trigger on `work_packages`** (`work_packages_block_insert_on_closed_project`, raises `P0002`) gated by `project_is_open(uuid)` (status in active/on_hold) ‚Äî **one chokepoint** over every WP-creation path (manual/template/copy/CSV) without re-typing the 3 creation RPCs, and **INSERT-only** so spec-144 reopen-to-rework (an UPDATE) + the rework WP's capture/labor/approval cycle keep working on a completed project (the warranty carve-out falls out for free; gates on WP status, not project status). The **project record stays editable** (status ‚Üí active to reopen the project; record retention notes in settings). **Actions** map `P0002` ‚Üí "ýπÇý∏Ñý∏£ý∏áý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏ôý∏µýπâý∏õý∏¥ý∏îýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß ýπÄý∏õý∏¥ý∏îýπÇý∏Ñý∏£ý∏áý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏Åýπàý∏≠ý∏ô‚Ä¶" (createWorkPackage/copyWorkPackages/applyWpTemplate/importWorkPackagesCsv). **UI (project page):** added `status` to the project select + `projectOpen`; when closed, hides the seeding controls + onboarding checklist and shows a lock banner pointing to settings. **pgTAP file 76** (plan 11): helper truth table, direct-insert + all 3 RPCs blocked on a completed project (P0002), create still works on active, **reopen-for-defect still works on a completed project (warranty)**; fixtures seed WPs while active then flip to completed (so the seed doesn't trip the trigger). **Verified-by-checklist** (DB lock pgTAP'd; UI gate + action mapping are thin glue over the tested DB behavior). **Out of scope (deliberate):** retention %/warranty billing ‚Äî a finance feature the app resists (status-only at most, per ceo-review); not built. **Project lifecycle now complete:** active/on_hold (full edit) ‚Üí completed (locked for new work; warranty: defects reopen individual WPs to rework ‚Üí fix ‚Üí re-approve) ‚Üí archived; reopen the project via status‚Üíactive. **Audit-found project-status gap closed.**

## Spec 167 ‚Äî WP detail segmented tabs (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED ‚Äî 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no schema / no new query** (pure UI restructure). lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **1328 unit (201 files; +4 TDD: wp-detail-tabs)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"WP detail page is too long with contents, scrolling through unrelated contents is distracting."_ Direction chosen via AskUserQuestion: **segmented tabs** (over collapse-sections / sticky-jump-nav). **Shipped:** `WpDetailTabs` ('use client') ‚Äî a WAI-ARIA tablist (`role=tablist/tab/tabpanel`, `aria-selected`, `aria-controls`/`labelledby`, arrow/Home/End roving focus) that shows **one panel at a time** with inactive panels kept **mounted via `hidden`** (so a half-typed purchase request + the spec-147 single fetch survive a switch ‚Äî NOT `?tab=` nav, which would re-run `loadWorkPackageDetail` per tap). Active tab = `text-action` + bottom indicator bar (mirrors `BottomTabBar`); ‚â•44px tap floor; token classes only (passes design-doctrine grep). Width via `PAGE_MAX_W`. **WP page regrouped:** header nameplate + phase progress bar + attention stack + defect/rework cards stay **pinned** (needs-action / at-a-glance, never behind a tap ‚Äî extends spec 94's "don't bury the assign prompt"); photos ¬∑ purchases ¬∑ labor ¬∑ info fold into tabs (ý∏£ý∏πý∏õý∏ñýπàý∏≤ý∏¢ default ¬∑ ý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ ¬∑ ýπÅý∏£ý∏áý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô ¬∑ ý∏Çýπâý∏≠ý∏°ý∏πý∏•), and the **planner management block (rename/priority/ý∏áý∏ßý∏îý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô-bind/schedule/delete) becomes a ý∏àý∏±ý∏îý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ tab appended only when `isPlanner`** ‚Äî it no longer pushes the capture hero down for PMs. Per-section `<h2>` icon headings dropped (tab label names the section); `Camera/FileText/ShoppingCart/Users` imports removed. **Deep link:** the pending-requests `CountChip` keeps `href="#wp-requests"`; `WpDetailTabs` takes `hashTabMap={{ "wp-requests": "purchases" }}` + listens for `hashchange` ‚Üí tapping the chip opens the ý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ tab. **Test** `wp-detail-tabs.test.tsx` (4): one tab per section + default-first, every panel mounted with inactive `hidden`, click switches the active panel, a mapped `hashchange` opens the right tab. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated route ‚Üí /login in preview, the standing constraint for SA/PM pages; behavior is unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance). **Out of scope (recorded):** no **sticky** tab bar this unit ‚Äî the header is already `sticky top-0` with a dynamic height, so a second sticky bar below it would need that height as its `top` offset (fragile); the tablist sits in normal flow under the pinned progress bar (still near the top, each panel now short). The **PM review** WP page (`/review/work-packages/[workPackageId]`) is a separate surface ‚Äî untouched; one-component follow-up if the operator wants the same there. **U2 (af3144d): ýπÅý∏£ý∏áý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô ‚Üí ý∏óý∏µý∏°ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô term sweep** ‚Äî operator flagged ýπÅý∏£ý∏áý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô ("labor/laborer") as a sensitive word; ý∏óý∏µý∏°ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô was already the de-facto SSOT for the workforce (/workers, roster, Nova, contacts). Replaced all 10 user-facing ýπÅý∏£ý∏áý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô literals phrased per context (tab, ý∏öý∏±ý∏ôý∏óý∏∂ý∏Åý∏óý∏µý∏°ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô button + tests, error, review heading/variance copy, delete-guard; over-alloc flag dropped the noun). Left ý∏Ñýπàý∏≤ýπÅý∏£ý∏á (standard wage term) + a pgTAP fixture name. Follow-up: single-source ý∏óý∏µý∏°ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô in labels.ts. db:test 201/1328 green.

## Spec 168 ‚Äî split subcontractor + DC contact pages (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED ‚Äî 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no schema / no new component** (pure IA split). lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **unit green (+ updated 3 pins)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"Setting page of sub contractor should not be in the same page as DC."_ Spec 99's `crews` group put **ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤ý∏äýπàý∏ßý∏á** (subcontractor ‚Äî a firm that pays its own crew) and **DC** (paid directly) on one page (`/contacts/crews`) behind a tab chip row, reached from a single ý∏ïý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏Ñýπàý∏≤ door `ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤ý∏äýπàý∏ßý∏á / DC`. They are different relationships ‚Üí split into two pages. **Shipped:** `lib/contacts/groups.ts` ‚Äî `ContactGroup` drops `crews`, adds `subcontractors: ["contractors"]` + `dc: ["dc"]` (single-type groups ‚Üí `ContactsTabs` renders no chip row via its `tabs.length > 1` guard). New routes **`/contacts/subcontractors`** (fetch `contractor_category='contractor'`, title `SUBCONTRACTOR_LABEL`) and **`/contacts/dc`** (fetch `='dc'`, title `ý∏óý∏µý∏° DC`), each + `loading.tsx`, both PM/super, `DetailHeader` back‚Üí/settings, reusing `ContactsTabs`. **`/contacts/crews` removed** (page + loading; it was a ý∏ïý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏Ñýπàý∏≤-only door, replaced here). **`/settings`:** the one merged door ‚Üí **two doors** ‚Äî ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤ý∏äýπàý∏ßý∏á (`/contacts/subcontractors`, icon `Hammer`) + DC (`/contacts/dc`, icon `Contact`, hint `DC ý∏õý∏£ý∏∞ý∏àý∏≥/ý∏äý∏±ýπàý∏ßý∏Ñý∏£ý∏≤ý∏ß/ý∏öý∏£ý∏¥ý∏©ý∏±ý∏ó`). `/workers` (DC _worker_ roster + day rates) untouched ‚Äî distinct from the DC _contact_ list. **Same `contractors` table + same detail route `/contacts/contractors/[id]` for both categories** ‚Äî only the list IA changed. **Tests (path b):** `contacts-groups.test.ts` asserts the new map + no `crews`; `contact-subcontractor-label.test.ts` SSOT surface crews‚Üísubcontractors; `nav-back-affordance.test.ts` `STATIC_DETAIL` drops crews, adds the two (the completeness guard forces every new page.tsx to be classified). **Lesson:** deleting a route leaves **stale `.next/types/validator.ts`** referencing the old `page.js` ‚Üí `tsc` fails with TS2307 until a build regenerates the route types (run `pnpm build` before re-typechecking). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated routes ‚Üí /login in preview; group map + route classification unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance).

## Spec 169 ‚Äî bottom tabs (+ hub strip) are first-layer destinations (2026-06-21)

Status: **SHIPPED ‚Äî 2026-06-21.** App-only, **no migration / no route / no role-set change** (nav behaviour). lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **unit green (nav suites 71; +1 TDD)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. Operator: _"Hitting the menu button should take users back to the top of the sitemap ‚Ä¶ all the tabs on the bottom of screen must be treated as first layer."_ **Root cause:** `BottomTabBar` rendered the **active** tab as an inert `<span>` (only inactive tabs were `<Link>`s), so on a sub-page (e.g. `/projects/[id]/...`) the section's own tab (ýπÇý∏Ñý∏£ý∏áý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£) was active = **not tappable** ‚Üí no one-tap way back to the section root (`/projects`, the first layer). **Fix:** render **every** tab as a `<Link>` to its root; the active one keeps its identity via `aria-current="page"` + the indicator bar + `text-action`/bold (active detection unchanged ‚Äî longest-prefix still lights exactly one). A tap on the active tab now returns to the first layer. **Extended to `HubNav`** (the desktop `sm:` strip the codebase keeps mirrored with the bottom bar ‚Äî same inert-`<span>` current item ‚Üí same dead tab on a cloud PC; operator is a desktop user, so parity matters): current item is now a `<Link aria-current="page">` with the underline/`font-semibold` style. **Tests (path b):** `bottom-tab-bar.test.tsx` ‚Äî new test pins the active tab is a tappable `<a href=root>` on a deep `/projects/[id]/work-packages/[id]` path; the PM active tab (ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏ïý∏£ý∏ßý∏à on /review) is a link to /review; `hub-nav.test.tsx` ‚Äî every item is a link, current carries `aria-current` (was: span). Both updated the prior "active renders as a span, not a link" pins. **Scope note:** detail screens that deliberately hide the bottom bar (WP detail's thumb capture bar) are unchanged ‚Äî this only changes how the bar behaves where it already renders. **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated routes; the nav components are unit-pinned; build green; operator on-device = acceptance). Spec doc `169-tabs-are-first-layer.md`.

## Spec 170 ‚Äî DC is a worker (ADR 0062 arc), U1 (2026-06-21)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-21.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest green** ¬∑ **db:test 114 files / 2193 / 0** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260778000000`; db:types regenerated. Operator: _"DC is confusing again"_ ‚Üí chose **rethink the model (unify the data)** + the decisive fact **"there is no DC firm, we hire DC directly"** ‚Üí **ADR 0062: a DC is a single `workers` record, no contractor party** (full design pass + prod audit showing 0 DC rows/payments/bindings = no migration risk; committed earlier 78973e5). **U1 (additive ‚Äî nothing removed; payment/portal/Nova stay party-keyed until U2‚ÄìU4):** migration `20260778000000_dc_worker_fields.sql` ‚Äî new enum `dc_arrangement` (regular|temporary); `workers` gains `dc_arrangement` (DC-only CHECK) + payee fields `phone`/`tax_id`/`bank_name`/`bank_account_number`/`bank_account_name` (length-capped). **bank+tax+phone = ZERO authenticated grant** (money/PII isolation, the day_rate posture spec 46 C3; admin-client-only); `dc_arrangement` granted (non-sensitive). `create_worker`/`update_worker` **DROP+CREATE** (can't add params via REPLACE) to accept the new fields ‚Äî reproduced the spec-152 `project_director` gate, reject an arrangement on a non-dc worker, and **re-applied the EXECUTE lockdown** (20260625000200) for the NEW signatures (else DROP resets to PUBLIC default ‚Üí anon hole + pgTAP 36 break). **`/workers` add form drops the ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤ parent picker for DC** (spec 160 already nulled contractor_id) + collects arrangement (ý∏õý∏£ý∏∞ý∏àý∏≥/ý∏äý∏±ýπàý∏ßý∏Ñý∏£ý∏≤ý∏ß) + payee fields; `createWorker` keeps an optional `contractorId` for the subcontractor-crew flow (contact-crew-section) only. **Tests:** `worker-roster-manager.test.tsx` (DC form shows arrangement+payee, no picker; adds DC worker w/ arrangement+bank); pgTAP 29 (+7 ‚Üí 60: bank/tax isolated 42501, dc_arrangement readable, create DC w/ no parent + stores arrangement/bank, arrangement rejected for non-dc); pgTAP 36 updated to the new 12/11-arg signatures. **Lessons:** the LATEST create_worker/update_worker bodies were in the spec-152 RPC-gate migration (project_director added), NOT the base ‚Äî always source the current body before DROP+CREATE; a DROP+CREATE resets EXECUTE to PUBLIC default so the lockdown grants must be re-applied for the new signature (pgTAP 36 is the guard); `pnpm exec supabase db query --linked --file` audits prod; run-pgtap.ts ignores file args (runs all). **NEXT (own sessions):** U2 Nova external‚Üíworker arrangement ¬∑ U3 dc_payments‚Üíworker ¬∑ U4 portal‚Üíworkers.user_id ¬∑ U5 remove /contacts/dc + door ¬∑ U6 labels. Edit-payee-in-place (create-only today) = small follow-up.

**U2 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-21** (mig 20260779000000; **db:test green**; app untouched, no type change). Nova "external" now reads the **worker's** `dc_arrangement='temporary'` instead of the contractor party's `contractor_subtype='dc_temporary'`. CREATE OR REPLACE (signatures unchanged ‚Üí grants preserved) the two functions that read the rule: `distribute_project_coins` (external ‚Üí flat external_factor weight, else level weight) + `coin_unvested_balance` (external lock ‚Äî whole balance unvested). pgTAP 106 (distribution) + 108 (vesting) repointed: the external DC fixture is marked `update workers set dc_arrangement='temporary'` (keyed on the holdover dc_temporary contractor); assertions unchanged. The contracts-UI `dc_temporary` subtype labels (/contacts/dc) are untouched ‚Äî they're the party subtype display, cleaned up in U5. **NEXT:** U3 dc_payments‚Üíworker.

**U4c-2 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-23** (3-unit arc, commits 74e3c3b¬∑e38df1b¬∑39f9358; migs `20260810000000` + fix-forward `20260810000100`; pgTAP `201` 18/18; lint¬∑typecheck¬∑vitest 1513 green). Staged worker (DC) bank-change ‚Üí PM approval ‚Äî the worker analogue of the contractor anti-fraud gate (spec 130 U4 / ADR 0051 ¬ß6) ‚Äî folded into the approvals-awareness arc (specs 183‚Äì186). **OPEN-6 resolved (operator AskUserQuestion): a parallel `worker_bank_change_requests` table, NOT polymorphic on the contractor table** ‚Äî the apply path forks (a worker change writes `workers.bank_*` inline, no `contact_bank` row) and a separate table isolates the shipped, pgTAP-pinned (file 39) contractor gate from regression. **U1 (DB):** table reuses enum `contractor_change_status`, bank caps match the workers columns (120/50/120); RLS readable-by-bound-worker (`current_user_worker_id()`) + pm/super/director, writes RPC-only; `submit_worker_bank_change` (bound-worker / own / one-pending) + `decide_worker_bank_change` (pm/super/director; approve writes `workers.bank_*`, reject discards; idempotent). **U2 (portal):** `WorkerBankChangeForm` on the /portal worker branch's bank card (reuses `validateBankChange` + `submitWorkerBankChange`), pending-state gate. **U3 (awareness fold):** the ý∏Ýý∏≤ý∏ûý∏£ý∏ßý∏° total badge gains a 4th read (WP + PR + contractor-bank + worker-bank); the dashboard bank-change card shows the COMBINED count; `/contacts/bank-changes` merges both kinds (queue item gains `kind` + a unified `name`; `BankChangeDecision` gains a `kind` prop routing approve/reject to the matching decide RPC; rows tagged ý∏óý∏µý∏°ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô / ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤). **Trap re-hit:** the status `CASE ‚Ä¶ 'approved' ‚Ä¶ END` yields TEXT ‚Üí no implicit text‚Üíenum cast ‚Üí `42804` on every decide; fix-forward `20260810000100` added `::public.contractor_change_status` (the same trap fixed for the contractor RPC in `20260708000100` ‚Äî copy the LIVE def, not the uncast base). **Concurrent-session handled:** a parallel spec-187 session shared the tree throughout; staged only my files explicitly each commit (never `git add -A`), db:types diff stayed mine-only (their migration was type-neutral). **STILL PENDING:** U4c-3 (DC documents, OPEN-7 storage RLS), OPEN-1 (portal DC-only vs dual-tenant). NEXT after this = U6 (DC labels pass; retire `contractor_users` if unused).

## Spec 175 ‚Äî item catalog (on-site storage / inventory foundation), U1 (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1366 (206 files; +1 TDD: catalog-list)** ¬∑ **db:test 121 files / 2311 / 0** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260801000000`; db:types regenerated. First unit of the on-site **storage-unit / inventory** feature (design in `docs/inventory-store/README.md`): the store is a transfer-pricing BU with three flows (Supply Plan / Stock-In / ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å), staged **cost-first**; everything downstream keys on one **item identity**, which the per-site spreadsheet can't provide. **U1 builds that item master ‚Äî read-only + seeded.** **Migration `20260801000000`:** new enum `item_category` (12 codes) + `catalog_items` (id, category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit text, stockable, note, is_active, created_at) ‚Äî reference data, **read-only to authenticated** (RLS enable; revoke anon+authenticated; grant select authenticated; SELECT policy `using(true)`; **no write policy** ‚Üí seeded by migration, the `wp_templates` posture spec 142). **Unique identity** index on `(base_item, coalesce(spec_attrs,''))` = the anti-drift guard the sheet lacked. **Seeded 71 deduped items** from the operator's previous-site purchase sheet (`docs/inventory-store/seed-catalog.csv`); **17 `stockable=false`** (made-to-length roofing CC/760+ý∏Ñý∏£ý∏≠ý∏ö, fire doors, stainless fab, engineered Aqua tanks ‚Üí direct-to-WP, never inventoried). **Units stored as text reusing `COMMON_UNITS`** (spec 16 doctrine: units are client-side text, NOT a DB table ‚Äî the course-correction from the original two-table design) ‚Äî normalised ý∏Åý∏Å.‚Üíý∏Åý∏¥ýπÇý∏•ý∏Åý∏£ý∏±ý∏°, ý∏°.‚ÜíýπÄý∏°ý∏ïý∏£; non-stock lines (freight/service/VAT/WHT) excluded. **No prices** (price is not item identity; real cost comes from receipts later). **Page `/catalog`:** server component, `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)` (pm/super/procurement/director ‚Äî the back-office curators, mirroring the suppliers master), settings drill-down (DetailHeader‚Üí/settings + BottomTabBar, no HubNav). `CatalogList` (pure presentational) groups by category in **enum order** (iterates the ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL key order), each row base_item¬∑spec¬∑unit + a **ýπÄý∏Åýπáý∏öý∏™ý∏ïýπäý∏≠ý∏Å / ý∏™ý∏±ýπàý∏áý∏ïý∏£ý∏áýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô** badge; empty state. **Labels (SSOT, labels.ts):** `CATALOG_LABEL`=ý∏óý∏∞ýπÄý∏öý∏µý∏¢ý∏ôý∏ßý∏±ý∏™ý∏îý∏∏, `ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` (12), `CATALOG_STOCKABLE_LABEL`/`CATALOG_NON_STOCKABLE_LABEL`. **Nav:** ý∏óý∏∞ýπÄý∏öý∏µý∏¢ý∏ôý∏ßý∏±ý∏™ý∏îý∏∏ door (Package icon) in the procurement block + isManager master-data block of `/settings`; `/catalog` added to the ý∏ïý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏Ñýπàý∏≤ tab `match`. **Tests:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (5: section per present category, **enum order not input order**, item name/spec/unit, stockable badge counts, empty state); pgTAP `119-item-catalog` (10: table/RLS, enum 12-label pin, anon-deny + auth-allow grants, **unique-identity reject (23505)**, seed present + known item + stockable & non-stockable exist). **Three completeness guards updated (the repo's anti-drift net):** `nav-back-affordance` STATIC_DETAIL (classify `catalog`), `feature-components-structure` ALLOWED_DOMAINS (new `catalog` domain folder), `bottom-tab-bar` ý∏ïý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏Ñýπàý∏≤ match. **Lessons:** the codebase already had a units vocabulary (`src/lib/purchasing/units.ts`) ‚Äî reused it as text rather than inventing an `item_units` table (CLAUDE.md: don't swap the established approach); adding a `features/<domain>/` folder trips the `feature-components-structure` allowlist (third anti-drift guard, alongside nav-back-affordance + the tab match). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page ‚Üí /login in preview; component unit-pinned, DB pgTAP'd; operator on-device = acceptance). **NEXT (later units):** create/edit catalog items (write RPC); then **Phase 2 ‚Äî Supply Plan** (PM bulk plan, qty-per-WP, PD approve-once, reactive-PR reason codes) = the PM-accuracy engine. Out of scope here: store entity, Stock-In, ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å/Issue, custody handshake, sell-rate/margin layer.

## Spec 175 ‚Äî item catalog, U2: add item (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1369 (207 files; +1 TDD: add-catalog-item)** ¬∑ **db:test 122 files / 2322 / 0** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260802000000`; db:types regenerated. Makes the catalog operable ‚Äî back-office adds items in-app (U1 was read-only/seeded). **Migration `20260802000000`:** `create_catalog_item(category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit, stockable, note) returns uuid` ‚Äî SECURITY DEFINER, role gate `current_user_role() in (project_manager/super_admin/procurement/project_director)` (the BACK_OFFICE set, inline like `apply_wp_template`), trims inputs (empty spec/note ‚Üí NULL via `nullif(btrim(coalesce(‚Ä¶,'')),'')`), length caps ‚Üí `22023`, unique-identity index ‚Üí `23505`. **`catalog_items` stays write-locked** (no INSERT grant / no write policy) ‚Äî the definer RPC is the sole write path (controlled writes for reference data). **`revoke ‚Ä¶ from anon`** explicitly (the Supabase default-privilege EXECUTE-to-anon trap ‚Äî applies to a fresh CREATE FUNCTION too, not just DROP+CREATE; pgTAP guards it). **Action `src/app/catalog/actions.ts`** `createCatalogItem`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)` (defense-in-depth + fast bounce), validates category against `ITEM_CATEGORY_LABEL` keys, calls the RPC under the user session, maps `23505`‚Üí"ý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏ôý∏µýπâý∏°ý∏µý∏≠ý∏¢ý∏πýπàýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß" / `42501`‚Üí"ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏°ý∏µý∏™ý∏¥ý∏óý∏òý∏¥ýπå", `revalidatePath('/catalog')`. **Typecheck caught** passing `null` to the RPC's `text` args (typegen types them non-null `string`) ‚Üí pass the trimmed strings, the RPC nullifies empties. **`AddCatalogItem` ('use client', BottomSheet):** category select, name, spec, **unit picker reusing `COMMON_UNITS` + ý∏≠ý∏∑ýπàý∏ô ýπÜ free-text** (`UNIT_OTHER_VALUE`), stockable checkbox (default on), note; submit ‚Üí reset + close + `router.refresh`; inline error. Sits above the read-only list on `/catalog`. **Tests:** `add-catalog-item.test.tsx` (4: submit-gating, create-with-values+refresh, free-text-unit reveal, inline error); pgTAP `120-create-catalog-item` (11: exists+secdef, anon-deny+auth-allow execute, PM creates+row lands, procurement creates, blank‚Üí22023, dup‚Üí23505, site_admin+visitor‚Üí42501). **Verified-by-checklist** (auth-gated page; component unit-pinned, RPC pgTAP'd; operator on-device = acceptance). **NEXT:** U3 edit / deactivate existing items (correct the seed / my U1 calls) ‚Äî then **Phase 2 Supply Plan** (the PM-accuracy engine). Catalog is now create-capable; edit/deactivate + Supply Plan remain.

## Spec 175 ‚Äî item catalog, U3: edit / deactivate (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1373 (208 files; +1 TDD: edit-catalog-item)** ¬∑ **db:test 123 files / 2336 / 0** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260803000000`; db:types regenerated. Makes the catalog **correctable** ‚Äî back-office edits any field or removes an item (so the operator can fix the U1 seed: the screw unit, the stockable flags). **Migration `20260803000000`:** two more controlled-write RPCs (catalog_items stays write-locked ‚Äî no table grant; the definer RPCs are the sole write path). `update_catalog_item(id, category, base_item, spec_attrs, unit, stockable, note) returns void` ‚Äî same back-office gate + trim/validate as create; **unknown id ‚Üí `22023`** (`get diagnostics row_count`), **duplicate identity ‚Üí `23505`** (the unique index). `set_catalog_item_active(id, active) returns void` ‚Äî **soft delete / restore** (`is_active`; the /catalog list shows active only, so deactivate = removal but reversible). Both `revoke ‚Ä¶ from anon` (default-priv trap). **Refactor (behaviour-preserving):** the U2 `AddCatalogItem` field set extracted to **`CatalogItemForm`** shared by add + edit (so the two never drift); a seeded unit not in `COMMON_UNITS` (ý∏ßý∏á/ý∏ùý∏≤/ý∏ïý∏πýπâ) opens as the free-text "other" so an edit preserves it. **`EditCatalogItem` ('use client'):** per-row "ýπÅý∏ÅýπâýπÑý∏Ç" ‚Üí BottomSheet pre-filled ‚Üí save (`updateCatalogItem`) or "ýπÄý∏≠ý∏≤ý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏Å" (`setCatalogItemActive` false). **Injected into each `CatalogList` row via an optional `renderRowAction` render-prop from the page** ‚Äî deliberately so the list module stays free of client-action imports (importing the `"use server"` actions file, which has `import "server-only"`, into the U1 list test would throw; the page ‚Äî a server component ‚Äî renders the client edit control instead). **Actions** `updateCatalogItem` / `setCatalogItemActive`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)`, UUID-guard, map `23505`/`42501`/`22023`, `revalidatePath`. **Tests:** `edit-catalog-item.test.tsx` (4: pre-fill, save+refresh, deactivate+refresh, inline error); pgTAP `121-edit-catalog-item` (14). **The U2 add test + U1 list test stay green** (the form extraction preserved AddCatalogItem's output; renderRowAction defaults off). **Lesson:** a server component CAN pass a render-prop function to another server component (no client boundary) ‚Äî the clean way to inject a client control per row without dragging server-action imports into a presentational list. **Verified-by-checklist.** **NEXT:** Phase 2 ‚Äî the **Supply Plan** (PM bulk plan, qty-per-WP, PD approve-once, reactive-PR reason codes) = the PM-accuracy engine. Catalog is now full CRUD-lite (create/edit/deactivate); read + write complete for the item master.

## Spec 175 ‚Äî item catalog, U4: item image (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1376 (209 files; +1 TDD: catalog-image-control)** ¬∑ **db:test 124 files / 2346 / 0** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260804000000`; db:types regenerated. Operator: "add images to the existing list." One reference photo per item ‚Äî thumbnail in the list + on the edit sheet. **Migration `20260804000000`:** private **`catalog-images`** bucket (25 MiB, image MIME) + a back-office INSERT policy on `storage.objects` (`current_user_role() in pm/super/procurement/director`); **NO SELECT policy** ‚Äî reads via service-role signed URLs (the photos-bucket posture spec 02/03). `catalog_items.image_path text` (**inherits the table-level SELECT grant** ‚Äî no column-grant trap, unlike `projects`). `set_catalog_item_image(id, path) returns void` ‚Äî back-office gate, null clears, unknown id ‚Üí `22023`, `revoke ‚Ä¶ from anon`. **`CatalogImageControl` ('use client'):** pick ‚Üí **reuse spec-34 `preparePhotoForUpload`** (client downscale, JPEG 0.8, EXIF baked) ‚Üí upload to `catalog-images` at `{itemId}/{crypto.randomUUID()}.{ext}` via the **browser** supabase client (the INSERT policy gates it) ‚Üí `setCatalogItemImage` records the path ‚Üí `router.refresh`. Replace + remove; **old objects retained on replace** (keep-originals doctrine [[ai-driven-direction-keep-images]]). Mounted on the `EditCatalogItem` sheet (image attaches on EDIT ‚Äî the item must exist for its storage path; matches "existing list"). **Display:** the page mints 120s signed URLs via **`mintSignedUrls(CATALOG_IMAGES_BUCKET, ‚Ä¶)`** (spec-65 shared core) for items with `image_path` ‚Üí `thumbnailUrl` on `CatalogItem` ‚Üí `CatalogList` renders a 40px thumbnail; placeholder icon when empty. **Actions** `setCatalogItemImage`: `requireRole(BACK_OFFICE_ROLES)`, UUID-guard, empty path ‚Üí clear, map `42501`/`22023`. **Tests:** `catalog-image-control.test.tsx` (3: downscale‚Üíupload‚Üírecord‚Üírefresh w/ path `^{id}/‚Ä¶\.jpeg$`, remove‚Üínull, reject-non-image) + pgTAP `122-catalog-item-image` (10). **`<img>` for signed URLs** (same as `ZoomablePhoto`) with an eslint-disable for `@next/next/no-img-element`. **Typecheck caught** `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`: pass `item.thumbnailUrl ?? null` (optional field ‚Üí can't hand an explicit `undefined` to a `?: string | null` prop). **Verified-by-checklist** (browser-upload seam is review/operator-phone verified per spec-34 precedent; control unit-pinned, RPC+bucket pgTAP'd). **Decision:** single current image (Option A) + retained old blobs honours keep-images without an append-only table; a `catalog_item_images` history table stays an additive later option. **NEXT:** Phase 2 ‚Äî the **Supply Plan** (the PM-accuracy engine). The item master is now view/add/edit/deactivate/image ‚Äî feature-complete as a catalog.

## Spec 175 ‚Äî item catalog, U5: consistent image slot + remove bad images (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1378 (209 files; +2: catalog-list placeholder)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. App-only ‚Äî **no migration / no DB schema change**. Operator feedback on the U4 image batch: "the images are not related, remove or change them" + "always put image placeholders, so the list is consistent." **(a) Removed the 8 auto-sourced CC images** ‚Äî `update catalog_items set image_path = null` (via `db query`) + deleted the bucket objects (`supabase storage rm --experimental --yes "ss:///catalog-images/<id>/web1.jpg"` ‚Äî **rm prompts `[y/N]`; the non-interactive shell defaults to N, so `--yes` is required**); deleted the now-stale `docs/inventory-store/image-credits.md`. The Openverse-sourced photos were generic representatives, not the actual items ‚Äî no reliable way to verify relevance without vision, so removed rather than re-guessed; operator adds real photos via ýπÅý∏ÅýπâýπÑý∏Ç. **(b) `CatalogList` always renders a 40px image slot** ‚Äî the thumbnail when `thumbnailUrl` present, else a placeholder (`role="img" aria-label="ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏°ý∏µý∏£ý∏πý∏õý∏Ýý∏≤ý∏û"` box + `ImageIcon`) ‚Äî so every row aligns regardless of whether an item has a photo (was: nothing rendered for imageless items ‚Üí ragged rows). **Test:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (+2: N placeholders for N imageless fixture rows; thumbnail-img-present + no-placeholder when an item has an image; the real `<img alt="">` is decorative so it's out of the a11y tree, leaving the placeholder the only `role=img` ‚Äî that's what the test keys on). **Lesson (image ops):** sourcing images programmatically without vision is unreliable for relevance ‚Äî prefer operator-supplied photos; the auto-source was a miss. **NEXT:** Phase 2 Supply Plan.

## Spec 175 ‚Äî item catalog, U6: category filter (2026-06-22)

Status: **U6 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1381 (209 files; +3: catalog-list filter)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. App-only ‚Äî **no migration / no DB change**. Operator: "since we already grouped by category, allow users to select category first" (+ "All" is an option). **`CatalogList` converted from a server component to `'use client'`** to hold the filter selection. Renders a `RadioChip` row (the spec-67 primitive ‚Äî native sr-only radio, 44px target, token active fill): **`ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏´ý∏°ý∏î (N)`** default (the full grouped overview) + a chip per **present** category (empty categories get no chip) with its item count; selecting one filters to that single section. **Architectural ripple:** because the list is now a client component, the per-row **`EditCatalogItem`** control (U3) **moved INSIDE `CatalogList`** behind an `editable` prop ‚Äî the U3 `renderRowAction` function-prop can't cross the server‚Üíclient boundary (spec-109 lesson: functions don't serialize server‚Üíclient). The page drops `renderRowAction` + its `EditCatalogItem` import and passes `<CatalogList items={‚Ä¶} editable />` (data only). The catalog-list test now mocks `@/app/catalog/actions` + `next/navigation` (CatalogList's module graph reaches the "use server" actions via EditCatalogItem). **Test:** `catalog-list.test.tsx` (+3: ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏´ý∏°ý∏î + chip-per-present-category, no chip for empty; select-category shows only its items; ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áý∏´ý∏°ý∏î restores all). **Lesson:** adding client state (a filter) to a presentational server list forces it client ‚Üí fold any server-injected render-props into data-only props. **NEXT:** Phase 2 Supply Plan.

## Spec 176 ‚Äî Supply Plan (PM-accuracy engine), U1: data foundation (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ `pnpm build` green ¬∑ **db:test 125 files / 2365 / 0** (file 176, 19 asserts); db:push applied `20260805000000`; db:types regenerated (+123). The start of Phase 2 ‚Äî the operator's stated purpose for the on-site store: measure **PM planning accuracy** (plan materials up front ‚Üí frozen baseline ‚Üí compare to actual/reactive). Sits on the catalog (spec 175): plan lines reference `catalog_items`. **Migration `20260805000000`:** enum `supply_plan_status` (draft/submitted/approved/rejected); **`supply_plans`** (id, project_id **unique ‚Äî one plan/project**, status, note, created_by `default auth.uid()`, created/submitted/approved stamps); **`supply_plan_lines`** (supply_plan_id, catalog_item_id, **nullable** work_package_id = site-general, qty `numeric(12,2)` CHECK>0, note) + **unique `(plan, item, coalesce(wp, sentinel))`**. **RLS:** both READ via `can_see_project` (ADR 0056 ‚Äî super/director/coordinator see-all, PM/SA by membership; `can_see_project` from migration 20260728); **no write policy** ‚Äî definer RPCs are the sole write path (catalog/deliverables posture). **RPCs (planner tier pm/super/director, incl. project_director per the spec-152 lesson):** `create_supply_plan(project)` ‚Äî **get-or-create** (idempotent), role + `can_see_project` membership + project-exists (22023); `add_supply_plan_line(plan, item, wp, qty, note)` ‚Äî **draft-only** (frozen plan ‚Üí 22023), qty>0, item exists+active, WP-belongs-to-plan-project, dup (item,WP) ‚Üí 23505. **pgTAP `176-supply-plan` (19):** structure + anon-deny; create idempotent; add returns id; qty‚â§0 / WP-other-project / inactive-item / dup / frozen-plan rejected; non-member PM + visitor ‚Üí 42501; super unknown-project ‚Üí 22023. **DB-only foundation** ‚Äî no app surface (verified by pgTAP). **Decisions made (flagged in the spec for operator review before U2/U3):** one-plan-per-project (no versioning yet); no price/ETA in the plan (PM intent only; price lives in procurement execution later); proposed reactive reason-code taxonomy (unplanned-miss/rework/breakage/scope-change/unforeseeable). **Lesson reused:** project-scoped child = READ via `can_see_project`, WRITE via role+membership definer RPC; always include `project_director` in the planner gate. **NEXT:** U2 planning UI (PM picks catalog items + WP + qty), then U3 submit+PD-approve (freeze).

## Spec 176 ‚Äî Supply Plan, U2: planning screen (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1386 (210 files; +4: supply-plan-manager)** ¬∑ **db:test 126 files / 2374 / 0** (file 177, 9 asserts) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260806000000`; db:types regenerated. The PM-facing planning screen ‚Äî first VISIBLE Supply Plan surface. **Migration `20260806`:** `remove_supply_plan_line(line)` ‚Äî SECURITY DEFINER, planner tier + member, **draft-only** (frozen plan ‚Üí 22023), unknown line ‚Üí 22023, anon-revoked; the table has no DELETE grant (RPC is sole delete path). **Page `/projects/[projectId]/supply-plan`** (dynamic route ‚Üí auto-classified as a detail route by nav-back-affordance; renders DetailHeader back‚Üíproject): `requireRole(PM_ROLES)` then project read via RLS (`can_see_project` ‚Üí non-member PM gets `notFound`); loads plan + lines (FK-join `catalog_items(base_item,spec_attrs,unit)` + `work_packages(code,name)` ‚Äî to-one embeds typed as objects, accessed `r.catalog_items?.base_item`) + pickers (active catalog items + project WPs). **`SupplyPlanManager`** ('use client'): status chip (ý∏£ýπàý∏≤ý∏á/ý∏™ýπàý∏áý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥ýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß/ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥ýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß/ý∏ïý∏µý∏Åý∏•ý∏±ý∏ö); "ýπÄý∏ûý∏¥ýπàý∏°ý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ýπÅý∏úý∏ô" ‚Üí BottomSheet (item `<select>` **grouped by category with `<optgroup>`** ‚Äî first optgroup use in the app, WP `<select>` **required in U2**, qty number, note) ‚Üí `addPlanLine`; per-line `Trash2` remove ‚Üí `removePlanLine`; **submitted/approved = read-only** (no add/remove). **Actions** `addPlanLine` (get-or-create `create_supply_plan` ‚Üí `add_supply_plan_line`) / `removePlanLine`: `getActionUser` + RPC + map `23505`("already planned")/`42501`/`22023` + `revalidatePath(supplyPlanHref)`. **Entry:** a `ClipboardList` chip on the project header (isManagerRole block) ‚Üí `supplyPlanHref`. **Feature folder `supply-plan` added to `feature-components-structure` ALLOWED_DOMAINS** (the 4th anti-drift guard hit this session). **Decision:** U2 form **requires a WP** per line (the core qty-per-WP case) ‚Äî avoids the nullable-uuid RPC-arg typing issue (a non-null `uuid` arg types as non-null `string`); site-general (null WP) stays schema-supported for a later "ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áýπÇý∏Ñý∏£ý∏áý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£" option. **Tests:** `supply-plan-manager.test.tsx` (4) + pgTAP 177 (9). **NEXT:** U3 submit + PD approve/reject (freeze the baseline), then U4 reactive reason codes, U5 measurement.

## Spec 176 ‚Äî Supply Plan, U3: submit + PD approve/reject (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 1388 (210 files; +2: supply-plan-manager lifecycle)** ¬∑ **db:test 127 files / 2391 / 0** (file 178, 17 asserts) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260807000000`; db:types regenerated (+3). The plan lifecycle + freeze. **Lifecycle:** `draft ‚Üí(PM submit)‚Üí submitted ‚Üí(PD approve)‚Üí approved [FROZEN]` / `‚Üí(PD reject)‚Üí rejected ‚Üí(PM revises+resubmits)`. **Separation of duties:** planner tier (pm/super/director) SUBMITS; only the approver tier (`project_director`/`super_admin`) APPROVES/REJECTS ‚Äî a plain PM cannot approve its own plan (pgTAP-pinned: PM approve ‚Üí 42501). **Migration `20260807`:** `submit_supply_plan` (planner; draft|rejected‚Üísubmitted, sets submitted_at), `approve_supply_plan` (PD/super; submitted‚Üíapproved, sets approved_by/at), `reject_supply_plan` (PD/super; submitted‚Üírejected); all SECURITY DEFINER + `can_see_project` + status-guard (wrong status ‚Üí 22023), anon-revoked. **CREATE OR REPLACE `add_supply_plan_line` + `remove_supply_plan_line`** to widen the edit gate `draft ‚Üí draft|rejected` (a rejected plan is revisable) ‚Äî same signatures so grants preserved (anon stays revoked; no pgTAP signature-pin break). **`SupplyPlanManager`:** `editable` includes `rejected`; header action group by state/role ‚Äî **ý∏™ýπàý∏áý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥** (planner, draft/rejected), **ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥/ý∏ïý∏µý∏Åý∏•ý∏±ý∏ö** (approver, submitted), **ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏ôý∏∏ý∏°ý∏±ý∏ïý∏¥** text (non-approver, submitted), frozen when approved. Page passes `planId` + `canApprove` (`ctx.role` director/super). **Actions** `submitPlan`/`approvePlan`/`rejectPlan`: getActionUser + RPC + map 42501/22023 + revalidatePath. **Tests:** `supply-plan-manager.test.tsx` (+3: submit, approve+reject, non-approver read-only) + pgTAP `178-supply-plan-lifecycle` (17: submit/approve/reject transitions, PM‚âÝapprover 42501, approved-frozen, rejected-editable-again, wrong-status 22023, visitor 42501). **NEXT:** U4 reactive-PR reason codes (tag scramble-orders; `unplanned-miss` dings PM), U5 measurement (planned vs reactive).

## Spec 176 ‚Äî Supply Plan, U4: reactive-PR reason codes (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 212 files / 1399 (+53: reason-code validators + 2 form tests + reason-module pins)** ¬∑ **db:test 128 files / 2406 / 0** (file 179, 16 asserts; file 33 + 91 updated) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260808000000` + `20260808000100`; db:types regenerated. Operator-locked (AskUserQuestion): (1) the 5-code taxonomy `unplanned_miss`/`rework`/`breakage`/`scope_change`/`unforeseeable` ‚Äî **only `unplanned_miss` counts against the PM**; (2) **required on every PR**; (3) **both create paths** (the `/requests` form + the WP-detail on-site quick-record). **Design (spec 176 ¬ßU4):** new enum `purchase_request_reason_code` + nullable `purchase_requests.reason_code` (NO default ‚Äî legacy rows stay null = pre-feature/unscored; required-ness on the WRITE paths, not a column NOT NULL or DB CHECK ‚Äî matches the `priority`/`needed_by` requester-field posture, ADR 0026); additive `grant insert (reason_code)` (column-scoped grant, spec 33); **insert RLS untouched** (pins 70/73/91/115 + the 64 owner-role fixtures stay green). Form path: `validateCreatePurchaseRequest` gains a required `reasonCode` (checked LAST so existing earlier-field error cases keep their message) + `createPurchaseRequest` inserts `reason_code` + a required reason `<select>` on `PurchaseRequestForm`. Site path: `validateSitePurchase` + `recordSitePurchase` + a required reason `<select>` on `SitePurchaseForm`. Shared `src/lib/purchasing/reason-code.ts` (type + list + guard) + `PURCHASE_REQUEST_REASON_CODE_LABEL` (ý∏ßý∏≤ý∏áýπÅý∏úý∏ôý∏ïý∏Åý∏´ý∏•ýπàý∏ô/ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ôýπÅý∏ÅýπâýπÑý∏Ç/ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏áý∏äý∏≥ý∏£ý∏∏ý∏î¬∑ýπÄý∏™ý∏µý∏¢ý∏´ý∏≤ý∏¢/ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏öýπÄý∏Çý∏ïý∏áý∏≤ý∏ôýπÄý∏õý∏•ý∏µýπàý∏¢ý∏ô/ýπÄý∏´ý∏ïý∏∏ý∏™ý∏∏ý∏îý∏ßý∏¥ý∏™ý∏±ý∏¢). **Out of scope (‚ÜíU5):** card/list display + planned-vs-reactive aggregation (the column carries the tag for U5 to read). **Migrations split into TWO:** `20260808000000` = enum + column + insert grant; `20260808000100` = `record_site_purchase` DROP+CREATE. **TWO traps caught by db:push/db:test + fixed forward ‚Üí [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **OVERLOAD** ‚Äî I sourced the RPC body from migration file `20260630000100` (5-arg) but the LIVE function was the **7-arg VAT version** (`20260701000200` added `p_vat_rate`); my first `record_site_purchase` create made a vat-LESS duplicate (would regress VAT) instead of replacing it. Fix: drop the real `(‚Ä¶,numeric,numeric)` + create the **7-arg** `(uuid,text,numeric,text,reason_code,numeric,numeric)` with reason BEFORE the defaulted amount/vat, VAT preserved; queried `pg_proc` to confirm a single signature; made mig 100 self-dropping (drops its own 7-arg too) so a repair+repush is idempotent. (2) **project_director ride-along** ‚Äî the reconstructed pre-152 body dropped `project_director` from the gate ‚Üí **pgTAP file 91** ("no PM-gated RPC left without project_director") went RED; re-added it. Plus a pgTAP UUID hex-length slip in 179 (13-char final group). **The meta-lesson: reconstruct a definer RPC body from the LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`/`pg_proc`, never an old migration file.** **Tests:** pgTAP 179 + `validate-purchase-request`/`validate-site-purchase` (+reason cases) + `purchase-request-form-reason` + `site-purchase-form-reason`. **NEXT:** U5 measurement (planned `supply_plan_lines` vs reactive `unplanned_miss` PRs, per project/WP/PM ‚Äî the PM-accuracy number).

## Spec 176 ‚Äî Supply Plan, U5: measurement (PM-accuracy) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 213 files / 1402 (+3: supply-plan-accuracy)** ¬∑ **db:test 129 files / 2421 / 0** (file 180, 15 asserts) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260808000200`; db:types regenerated. **Spec 176 arc COMPLETE.** The payoff: surface planned vs reactive so the operator sees how well a PM planned. Migration `20260808000200` (808000000/100 were U4), pgTAP `180`. **Design (spec 176 ¬ßU5):** PRs carry `work_package_id` + free-text item (no `catalog_item_id`) ‚Üí can only measure count-based PER WP (no PR‚Üîplan-line item match). **RPC `supply_plan_accuracy(p_project_id)`** SECURITY DEFINER, planner tier (incl. project_director per file-91 pin) + `can_see_project` (unknown‚Üí22023); returns a TABLE one row per WP (or null=site-general) with a plan line OR a PR: `planned_lines`, `planned_qty`, `unplanned_miss`, `fair_reactive` (rework/breakage/scope_change/unforeseeable), `untagged` (null reason). FULL OUTER JOIN of per-WP planned + per-WP PR aggregates (PRs‚Üíproject via `work_packages.project_id`), worst-offender first. ALL PR statuses count (status-filter = flagged refinement). **Surface:** read-only `SupplyPlanAccuracy` server component on `/projects/[id]/supply-plan` ‚Äî project totals (planned ¬∑ unplanned_miss HIGHLIGHTED ¬∑ fair ¬∑ untagged) + per-WP table (site-general = "ý∏óý∏±ýπâý∏áýπÇý∏Ñý∏£ý∏áý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£"). **Per-PM:** per-project number = per-PM-per-project (plan has created_by); cross-project roll-up = flagged follow-up, NOT built. **Tests:** pgTAP 180 + `supply-plan-accuracy.test.tsx`. **Lesson (caught by db:test):** the plan-line unique index is `(plan, item, coalesce(wp, sentinel))` ‚Üí two lines on the SAME WP need TWO catalog items; my first fixture used one item and asserted 2 lines (impossible) ‚Äî the RPC was correct, the fixture wrong. **Spec 176 (Supply Plan) COMPLETE: U1 data ‚Üí U2 planning UI ‚Üí U3 submit/approve freeze ‚Üí U4 reactive reason codes ‚Üí U5 PM-accuracy measure. NEXT (storage arc Phase 3):** store + stock-in at cost (ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ ‚Üí store buys from supplier; reuse deliveries spec 135).

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In (ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤) at cost (inventory Phase 3), U1: data foundation (2026-06-22)

Status: **U1 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 213 files / 1402** (DB-only ‚Äî no unit-test delta) ¬∑ **db:test 130 files / 2445 / 0** (file 181, 24 asserts) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000000`; db:types regenerated. **Phase 3 of the on-site storage/inventory arc** (after spec 175 catalog + spec 176 supply plan). The store is a transfer-pricing BU; this unit puts STOCK ON HAND ‚Äî goods enter the store, at COST, and the store knows what it holds and what it's worth. **Cost-first staging is a locked dial:** the sell-to-WP margin layer + the flip of `wp_profit` to at-issue-sell-price + external sales are LATER phases, explicitly NOT this spec. **Operator decisions (AskUserQuestion, all 3 recommended):** (1) **stock-in source = standalone catalog-keyed receipt** ‚Äî a "store buys catalog item X, qty Y, at unit-cost Z from supplier S" entry keyed on `catalog_item_id`; it does **not** touch the existing PR/PO/delivery flow (whose lines are FREE-TEXT, no catalog link), so zero purchasing-break risk; a future PO‚Üístore linkage is flagged. (2) **on-hand = per-project, NO `stores` table** ‚Äî keyed by `(project_id, catalog_item_id)`, the project's on-site store is implicit ("1 unit per site"), RLS rides existing `can_see_project`, issue-to-WP (Phase 4) stays in-project. (3) **moving-avg cost tracked NOW** ‚Äî `qty_on_hand` + `total_value` ‚Üí avg = value/qty (the COST basis, not the sell/margin layer). **Design (spec 177 ¬ßU1, DB-only ‚Äî mirrors the 176-U1 cadence; /store UI is U2):** `stock_receipts` (append-only ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ events: project_id, catalog_item_id, qty>0, **unit snapshotted from the catalog item at receipt**, unit_cost‚â•0, **`total_cost` GENERATED `qty*unit_cost`**, nullable supplier_id, received_at, note, created_by ‚Äî no UPDATE/DELETE policy; corrections = a later reversal unit per CLAUDE.md append-only doctrine) + `stock_on_hand` (derived, PK `(project_id, catalog_item_id)`, qty_on_hand + total_value; moving-avg cost is DERIVED not stored). **RPC `record_stock_in(project, item, qty, unit_cost, supplier, note)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = `BACK_OFFICE_ROLES` (pm/super/procurement/director ‚Äî the cost-bearing curation tier; documented ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ actor is procurement); membership = `can_see_project(project) OR current_user_role()='procurement'` (procurement is a cross-project curator, mirrors spec 171/172); validates project/active-catalog-item/qty>0/unit_cost‚â•0/supplier-exists (all 22023), non-member‚Üí42501; inserts the receipt + **additively** upserts on-hand (`on conflict ‚Ä¶ do update set qty+=, value+=`) ‚Äî a pure stock-IN needs no weighted-avg recompute (that's issue-OUT, Phase 4). **READ:** both tables SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` arm (procurement must read what it writes); no write policy ‚Äî the RPC is the sole writer. **Migration `20260809000000`, pgTAP `181`** (structure + anon-deny, procurement cross-project + PM-member happy paths, moving-avg maths across two receipts at different unit costs ‚Üí value 600/qty 20 = avg 30, generated total_cost, unit snapshot, every deny/validation branch). **THREE traps caught + fixed forward:** (1) **bare `current_user_role()` in an RLS policy** ‚Üí the "no public policy calls current_user_role() bare" guard pgTAP went RED ‚Äî Postgres-RLS perf pattern requires `(select public.current_user_role())` (I'd wrapped `can_see_project` but not the role call); fixed both policies (edited the migration file AND applied the wrap live via `supabase db query --file` so file==DB, no noise migration). (2) **`suppliers.created_by` is NOT NULL with no default** ‚Äî my fixture inserted only (id, name) ‚Üí the whole 181 file errored at setup ("not ok - 181"); added created_by. (3) **plan() undercount** ‚Äî `plan(22)` but 24 asserts ran (miscounted the read-posture section) ‚Üí `plan(24)`. **Lesson:** when a fixture row errors, the runner reports the whole file `not ok` with the diagnostic hidden if you grep-filter the output ‚Äî re-run unfiltered to a file to see the `# ERROR:` line. **Out of scope (flagged):** /store UI (read on-hand + record form) = U2; ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å/Issue + two-party custody + weighted-avg-cost decrement = Phase 4; GL posting of stock-in (Dr Inventory/Cr AP into the spec-149 outbox) = later; PO‚Üístore linkage (needs catalog_item_id on PR/PO lines first); receipt reversal/correction; required supplier; stock count/variance; SA self-receive (self-governance). **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U2 = the `/store` surface (read on-hand per project + the record-stock-in form, back-office tier).

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U2: the /store surface (read on-hand + record stock-in) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U2 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 214 files / 1409 (+7: store-manager)** ¬∑ **db:test 130 files / 2445 / 0** (no new pgTAP file; 181 re-runs green after the function REPLACE) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000100`; db:types regenerated. The screen that drives the U1 engine: a back-office user picks a project, sees its on-hand stock, and records a ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ at cost. **Surface (`/store`, single route, BACK_OFFICE_ROLES, settings drill-down ‚Äî DetailHeader back‚Üí/settings, no HubNav, mirrors /catalog):** a project `<select>` (RLS-scoped picker ‚Äî procurement sees all, PM sees member projects; `onChange` ‚Üí `router.push('/store?project=<id>')`); the chosen project's on-hand list (item ¬∑ ý∏ïýπâý∏ôý∏óý∏∏ý∏ôýπÄý∏âý∏•ý∏µýπàý∏¢ avg = value/qty ¬∑ qty+unit ¬∑ value) + a `ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ý∏™ý∏ïýπäý∏≠ý∏Å` BottomSheet form (catalog item `<optgroup>` by category ¬∑ ý∏àý∏≥ý∏ôý∏ßý∏ô ¬∑ ý∏£ý∏≤ý∏Ñý∏≤ý∏ïýπâý∏ôý∏óý∏∏ý∏ô/ý∏´ý∏ôýπàý∏ßý∏¢ ¬∑ optional ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏Çý∏≤ý∏¢ ¬∑ ý∏´ý∏°ý∏≤ý∏¢ýπÄý∏´ý∏ïý∏∏) ‚Üí `recordStockIn` action. The record UI is gated on a selected project (no project = pick-a-project hint, no form). **`StoreManager`** ('use client': selector navigation, sheet state, submit transition + refresh) in the new `src/components/features/store/` folder. **`recordStockIn` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates uuids/qty>0/unit_cost‚â•0, maps the RPC's 42501/22023, `revalidatePath('/store')`. **Labels SSOT:** `STORE_LABEL` (ý∏™ýπÇý∏ïý∏£ýπåý∏´ý∏ôýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô) + `STORE_RECEIVE_LABEL` (ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ý∏™ý∏ïýπäý∏≠ý∏Å) in `labels.ts`. **Nav:** ý∏™ýπÇý∏ïý∏£ýπåý∏´ý∏ôýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô door (Warehouse icon) in /settings procurement + manager blocks (next to ý∏óý∏∞ýπÄý∏öý∏µý∏¢ý∏ôý∏ßý∏±ý∏™ý∏îý∏∏). **Migration `20260809000100`** = CREATE OR REPLACE `record_stock_in` adding `default null` to the two trailing nullable args (p_supplier_id, p_note) ‚Äî same signature, grants preserved, pgTAP-181 positional calls unaffected. **Updated 3 anti-drift guards (the spec-175 settings-drill-down trio):** nav-back-affordance `STATIC_DETAIL += "store"`, feature-components-structure `ALLOWED_DOMAINS += "store"`, bottom-tab `SETTINGS_TAB.match += "/store"` (no per-role `[label,href]` pin touched ‚Äî only the match array). **TWO typegen traps caught by typecheck + fixed forward ‚Üí [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **nullable RPC arg needs `default null`** (the spec-155 lesson, re-learned) ‚Äî `p_supplier_id` had no default ‚Üí generated Args typed it required `string`, so passing a null supplier wouldn't compile; added `default null` (+ trailing `p_note` per Postgres trailing-default rule) via the U2 migration; reconstructed the body from LIVE `pg_get_functiondef` (the U4 rule). (2) **`exactOptionalPropertyTypes` forbids explicit `undefined`** for an optional prop ‚Üí can't pass `p_supplier_id: supplierId ?? undefined`; must OMIT the key ‚Äî conditional spread `...(supplierId !== null ? { p_supplier_id: supplierId } : {})`. **Test (written first, RED proven):** `store-manager.test.tsx` (on-hand rows + derived avg-cost display, empty state, project-selector navigation, submit-gating until item+qty+cost, the recordStockIn call shape, record control hidden until a project is chosen). Self-inflicted test-helper bug fixed: `opts.selectedProjectId ?? "p1"` coerced an explicit `null` to "p1" ‚Üí use `=== undefined ?` to distinguish omitted from null. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (the page is behind requireRole/LINE auth; no real creds on the cloud PC ‚Äî spike-02). **Out of scope (unchanged from U1):** ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å/Issue + custody (Phase 4), GL posting of stock-in, PO‚Üístore linkage, receipt reversal, stock count/variance, SA self-receive, the margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U3 ‚Äî ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å/Issue (issue-out to a WP, weighted-avg-cost decrement, two-party custody handshake), the first OUT flow.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U3: ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å/Issue (the first OUT flow), at weighted-avg cost (2026-06-22)

Status: **U3 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 214 files / 1409** (DB-only ‚Äî no unit-test delta) ¬∑ **db:test 131 files / 2465 / 0** (file 182, 20 asserts) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000200`; db:types regenerated. The first OUT flow: a work package draws stock from its project's store; the store issues it OUT at the **moving-average cost** (the COST basis ‚Äî the sell/margin layer stays locked out). **Design (spec 177 ¬ßU3, DB-only ‚Äî mirrors the U1 cadence; the ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å UI is U4):** `stock_issues` (append-only ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å events: project_id, catalog_item_id, **work_package_id NOT NULL** = the WP drawn for, qty>0, **unit snapshot**, **unit_cost = moving-avg at issue**, **`total_cost` GENERATED**, note, issued_by, issued_at ‚Äî no UPDATE/DELETE policy; corrections = a later reversal). **RPC `issue_stock(project, item, wp, qty, note default null)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = **SITE_STAFF_ROLES** (site_admin draws at the WP + the PM tier ‚Äî **NOT procurement**, which does ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ IN not ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å OUT ‚Äî the gate that differs from U1/U2) + `can_see_project`; validates qty>0 / WP-in-project / active-catalog-item / **sufficient on-hand** (all 22023), non-member‚Üí42501; **locks the on-hand row (`for update`)**, computes `avg = round(total_value/qty_on_hand, 2)`, decrements `qty_on_hand -= qty` and `total_value -= qty*avg` ‚Äî **fully depleting forces total_value to 0** so rounding dust never lingers ‚Äî and writes the issue at the snapshot avg cost. **READ:** `stock_issues` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (consistent with receipts/on-hand; policy uses the wrapped `(select current_user_role())` ‚Äî the U1 guard lesson applied up front). **Migration `20260809000200`, pgTAP `182`** (structure + anon-deny; site_admin issues 5 of 20@avg30 ‚Üí on-hand 15 / value 450, issue unit_cost 30 / total_cost 150; issue the remaining 15 ‚Üí qty 0 / value forced 0; insufficient-stock 22023; PM-member issues a 2nd item; qty‚â§0 + WP-from-another-project 22023; non-member + visitor 42501; member reads 3 issues, outsider 0). **Clean first push ‚Äî no traps** (the U1/U2 lessons preempted them: policy wrapped, fixtures complete, plan count correct). **Out of scope (flagged):** the ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å UI (a button on the WP detail and/or /store) = **U4**; **two-party custody handshake** (store-keeper hands / receiver attests, reuse polymorphic consents) = later; **wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`** (the WP material cost = at-issue cost) = the cost-attribution/margin layer, deliberately deferred; equipment round-trip return; receipt/issue reversal; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U4 ‚Äî the ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å UI (issue-out from the WP detail / store), then the two-party custody handshake.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U4: the ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å UI on /store (issue-out + recent issues) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U4 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 214 files / 1414 (+5: store-manager ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å cases)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (the `issue_stock` RPC + `stock_issues` table shipped in U3; types already regenerated) ‚Üí no migration, no db:test delta. The first UI for the OUT flow: the U3 `issue_stock` engine now has a button. **Surface choice:** put ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å on the **existing `/store` console** (reuses U2's per-project on-hand) ‚Äî /store becomes a complete store console (see on-hand ¬∑ ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤ ¬∑ ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å) with the least new code. **Gate:** the ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å control shows only for the **manager tier** (`isManagerRole` = PM/super/director) ‚Äî the intersection of `/store` access (BACK_OFFICE) and the `issue_stock` gate (SITE_STAFF); **procurement reaches /store but cannot issue** (button hidden), and **site_admin can issue per the RPC but isn't on /store** ‚Üí its field-draw UI at the WP detail is **U5** (flagged). **Design:** each on-hand row gets a `ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å` button ‚Üí a BottomSheet pre-scoped to THAT item (shows "ý∏°ý∏µýπÉý∏ôý∏°ý∏∑ý∏≠ N unit") with a WP `<select>` (the project's WPs) + qty + note ‚Üí `issueStock` action ‚Üí `issue_stock` RPC ‚Üí refresh. Below on-hand, a read-only **ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Åý∏•ýπàý∏≤ý∏™ý∏∏ý∏î** list (last 10 issues: item ¬∑ WP ¬∑ at-issue cost ¬∑ qty). **`StoreManager`** gains `canIssue` / `workPackages` / `issues` props + the issue-sheet state (a second `useTransition`); the page computes `canIssue`, fetches the project's WPs + the recent `stock_issues` (joined to catalog_items + work_packages). **`issueStock` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) validates the 3 uuids + qty>0, maps the RPC's 42501 ‚Üí no-permission and 22023 ‚Üí "ý∏™ý∏ïýπäý∏≠ý∏ÅýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏ûý∏≠ ý∏´ý∏£ý∏∑ý∏≠ý∏Çýπâý∏≠ý∏°ý∏πý∏•ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏ñý∏πý∏Åý∏ïýπâý∏≠ý∏á" (covers insufficient stock / wrong-project WP / inactive item), `revalidatePath('/store')`. **Label:** `STORE_ISSUE_LABEL` (ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Åý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏Å) in `labels.ts`. **No new anti-drift guards** (the `/store` route + the `store` component folder were already registered in U2; no migration, no nav change). **Test (written first, RED proven ‚Äî 4 failed/7 passed before, 11/11 after):** `store-manager.test.tsx` gains the ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å describe (no control when `!canIssue`, a control per row when `canIssue`, issuing the row's item to the chosen WP+qty calls `issueStock`, submit gating on WP+qty, the recent-issues list renders). The two sheets share a `ý∏àý∏≥ý∏ôý∏ßý∏ô` label but never collide ‚Äî `BottomSheet` returns null when closed (verified), so only the open sheet's labels are in the DOM. **Browser pass = operator on-device** (page behind requireRole/LINE auth). **Out of scope (flagged):** **U5 = the site_admin field-draw UI at the WP detail** (the doctrine's primary drawer); the two-party custody handshake; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U5 ‚Äî ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å at the WP detail for site_admin (field self-service), then the custody handshake.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U5: ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å at the WP detail (site_admin field-draw) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U5 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 215 files / 1419 (+5: wp-issue-stock)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U3 `issue_stock` RPC + the U4 `issueStock` action) ‚Üí no migration, no db:test delta. The doctrine's PRIMARY drawer: a site_admin draws stock from the project store TO the WP they're standing in ‚Äî at the WP detail screen, not /store (site_admin has no /store access). **Surface:** a ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å block in the **ý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏Çý∏≠ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ tab** of the WP detail (`src/app/projects/[projectId]/work-packages/[workPackageId]/page.tsx`), rendered in a CARD right after the ý∏öý∏±ý∏ôý∏óý∏∂ý∏Åý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏ãý∏∑ýπâý∏≠ý∏´ý∏ôýπâý∏≤ý∏áý∏≤ý∏ô (site-purchase) block ‚Äî both gated `!readOnly` (= SITE_STAFF, which is exactly the `issue_stock` gate; **procurement is the read-only viewer ‚Üí no ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å**, mirroring site-purchase). **New component `WpIssueStock`** (`src/components/features/store/wp-issue-stock.tsx`, 'use client'): a `ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Åý∏ßý∏±ý∏™ý∏îý∏∏ý∏àý∏≤ý∏Åý∏™ýπÇý∏ïý∏£ýπå` button ‚Üí BottomSheet (item `<select>` from the project's on-hand showing "ý∏°ý∏µ N unit", qty, note) ‚Üí `issueStock({project, item, **this WP**, qty, note})` ‚Üí `router.refresh()`; empty store ‚Üí "ý∏¢ý∏±ý∏áýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏°ý∏µý∏™ý∏ïýπäý∏≠ý∏ÅýπÉý∏ôý∏™ýπÇý∏ïý∏£ýπå" + no button; below it, this WP's recent ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å list. **Page wiring:** the project's `stock_on_hand` (qty>0, joined to catalog_items) + this WP's `stock_issues` (last 10) ride the existing `loadWorkPackageDetail` Promise.all (no waterfall). **Simplification (typecheck-driven):** dropped a `readOnly`-conditional on the FETCH (the typed-empty `Promise.resolve` placeholders fought the PostgREST embed union) ‚Äî procurement may READ on-hand via RLS anyway (no leak), so always fetch and gate only the RENDER by `!readOnly`. **Consistency:** the WP ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å reuses the U4 button‚Üísheet UX + the same `STORE_ISSUE_LABEL` / `issueStock` action ‚Äî one ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å mechanism, two entry points (/store for managers, WP detail for the field). **No new guards/migration/nav** (the `store` component folder + the WP route already registered; no new route). **Test (written first, RED proven):** `wp-issue-stock.test.tsx` (offers a control when the store has stock, empty-state + no control when empty, issuing the chosen item to THIS WP calls `issueStock`, submit gating on item+qty, the recent-issues list renders). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å/Issue now has BOTH surfaces** ‚Äî the manager console (/store, U4) and the field self-service (WP detail, U5). **Out of scope (flagged):** the **two-party custody handshake** (store-keeper hands / receiver attests, reuse polymorphic consents) = next; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit` (cost-attribution, deferred with the margin layer); equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** the two-party custody handshake on ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å (who holds the item), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U6: two-party custody handshake on ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å (2026-06-22)

Status: **U6 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 215 files / 1419** (DB-only ‚Äî no unit delta) ¬∑ **db:test 132 files / 2483 / 0** (file 183, 18 asserts) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000300`; db:types regenerated. The self-governance custody layer: every issued item gets exactly one custodian so "who lost it" is always answerable; shrinkage = a store P&L hit. **Operator decisions (AskUserQuestion, both recommended):** (1) **issue now, receiver confirms after** ‚Äî keep ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å as it is (stock decrements immediately, recorded by the keeper) + name a RECEIVER who later attests receipt; smallest change to the shipped issue flow. (2) **the receiver is a WORKER** (the team member who physically takes the material ‚Äî the self-governance actor; confirms via the worker portal). **Design (spec 177 ¬ßU6, DB-only; the receiver-picker at ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å + the portal confirm UI are U7):** `stock_issues` gains `receiver_worker_id` (FK workers, nullable ‚Äî legacy + the /store-manager path have none) + `received_at` (null = pending receipt, the audit flag). **`issue_stock` widened** with a trailing `p_receiver_worker_id default null` (DROP the 5-arg + CREATE the 6-arg = ONE overload, body reconstructed verbatim from LIVE `pg_get_functiondef`; the 5-positional callers ‚Äî pgTAP + the issueStock action ‚Äî still resolve here, receiver defaulting null); validates a named receiver is an **active worker on this project (or unassigned)** (22023). **New `confirm_stock_issue(issue)`** SECURITY DEFINER: the NAMED receiver worker attests ‚Äî `current_user_worker_id()` (the portal binding) must equal the issue's `receiver_worker_id`; sets `received_at`; non-worker‚Üí42501, unknown/no-receiver/already-confirmed‚Üí22023, wrong-worker‚Üí42501. **RLS:** `stock_issues` SELECT gains a `receiver_worker_id = (select current_user_worker_id())` arm so the worker portal can list their issues. **Migration `20260809000300`, pgTAP `183`.** **TWO traps caught by db:test + fixed forward ‚Üí [[prc-ops-db-migration-lessons]]:** (1) **the issue_stock signature change broke pgTAP 182's structure pin** ‚Äî 182 asserted the 5-arg `issue_stock(uuid,uuid,uuid,numeric,text)` exists (`to_regprocedure` + `has_function_privilege`), which after the DROP returns null / errors on a non-existent function; updated 182's two pins to the 6-arg signature (the behavioral 5-positional calls still resolve, untouched). The meta-lesson: **widening an RPC's arity = grep every pgTAP file pinning the old signature.** (2) **a non-receiver worker can't READ the target issue via RLS**, so my first test passed the issue id through an RLS-scoped subquery ‚Üí it resolved to NULL ‚Üí `confirm_stock_issue(null)` raised 22023 (unknown), not the intended 42501 (receiver-mismatch); fixed by inserting the issue with a FIXED id and passing that literal (the definer RPC sees it and enforces the receiver-only rule). Plus an infra note: the remote pooler threw a transient `ECIRCUITBREAKER` on one file mid-suite (heavy DB traffic) ‚Äî re-ran clean. **Out of scope (flagged):** **U7 = the custody UI** (pick a receiver worker when ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å'ing at the WP detail + the worker-portal "ýπÑý∏îýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß" confirm + a pending-receipt indicator); a manager confirm-on-behalf override; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U7 ‚Äî the custody UI (receiver picker + portal confirm), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U7: custody UI ‚Äî receiver picker + pending/received badge (2026-06-22)

Status: **U7 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 215 files / 1423 (+4: wp-issue-stock receiver/badge + store-manager badge)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U6 `issue_stock` 6-arg + `stock_issues.receiver_worker_id`/`received_at`) ‚Üí no migration, no db:test delta. The ISSUE side of the custody handshake gets a UI: name a receiver when ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å'ing, and see pending-vs-received status. **Scope:** the receiver picker lives on the **WP-detail ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å** (`WpIssueStock`, the field surface where hand-over to a worker physically happens); the pending/received **badge** shows on BOTH recent-issues lists (/store + WP detail). The **/store-manager receiver picker is deferred** (managers allocate stock to a WP; the on-site receiver is the field's job) and the **worker-portal "ýπÑý∏îýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß" confirm is U8**. **Design:** `WpIssueStock` gains a `workers` prop + a `ý∏úý∏πýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏ö (ý∏ñýπâý∏≤ý∏°ý∏µ)` `<select>` (the project's active workers) in the ýπÄý∏öý∏¥ý∏Å sheet ‚Üí `issueStock` passes `receiverWorkerId` (conditional spread ‚Äî omit when none, the supplier/exactOptionalPropertyTypes pattern); `WpIssueRow`/`IssueRow` gain `receiverName`/`receivedAt` (+ `receiverWorkerId` on the /store row) and each list renders a badge ‚Äî `ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏£ý∏±ý∏ö` (text-ink-muted) vs `ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß` (text-action), shown only when a receiver was named (the manager path leaves it null = no badge). **Page wiring:** the WP-detail page fetches the project's active workers (`workers` where project_id + active ‚Äî site_admin reads them via the "workers readable by staff" RLS policy; the labour fetch already uses the RLS client) on the existing Promise.all, builds an id‚Üíname map, and resolves `receiverName` from it (no fragile PostgREST embed); both pages add `receiver_worker_id, received_at` to the `stock_issues` select. **`issueStock` action** gains an optional `receiverWorkerId` ‚Üí `p_receiver_worker_id` (omit-key conditional spread). **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (everything rides the U6 schema + existing routes). **Tests (written first, RED proven ‚Äî 4 failed/16 passed before, 20/20 after):** `wp-issue-stock.test.tsx` (the receiver select ‚Üí `issueStock` called with `receiverWorkerId`; the pending/received badges + receiver name) + `store-manager.test.tsx` (the /store list badges pending vs received). **Browser pass = operator on-device.** **Out of scope (flagged):** **U8 = the worker-portal confirm** (`/portal` lists a worker's pending issues + a `ýπÑý∏îýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß` button ‚Üí a `confirmStockIssue` action calling the U6 `confirm_stock_issue` RPC); the /store-manager receiver picker; a manager confirm-on-behalf override; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; stock count/variance; reversals. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U8 ‚Äî the worker-portal receipt confirm (closes the custody loop), then stock count/variance.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U8: worker-portal receipt confirm (closes the custody loop) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U8 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 216 files / 1426 (+3: portal-receipts)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U6 `confirm_stock_issue` RPC + the receiver-read RLS arm) ‚Üí no migration, no db:test delta. **The custody loop is now closed:** the receiver worker attests receipt from their own portal, flipping the issue `ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏£ý∏±ý∏ö ‚Üí ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß`. **Design:** the `/portal` worker branch (when `get_my_worker_profile` returns a bound worker) gains a **ý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏£ý∏±ý∏ö** section, placed FIRST in the body (the actionable surface). It fetches the worker's pending issues ‚Äî `stock_issues` where `received_at is null`, joined to catalog_items + work_packages ‚Äî on the existing Promise.all; **the U6 receiver-read RLS arm scopes this to the bound worker's own issues** (a worker is not a project member, so the policy returns only rows where `receiver_worker_id = current_user_worker_id()`), so no explicit worker filter is needed. **New `PortalReceipts`** client component (`src/components/features/portal/portal-receipts.tsx`): each pending item (name ¬∑ spec ¬∑ WP ¬∑ qty) with a `ýπÑý∏îýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß` button ‚Üí `confirmStockIssue` ‚Üí `router.refresh()`; empty ‚Üí `ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏°ý∏µý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏£ý∏±ý∏ö`; a per-row submitting state + an inline error. **New `confirmStockIssue(issueId)` server action** (`src/app/store/actions.ts`) calls the `confirm_stock_issue` RPC, maps 42501 (not the named receiver) ‚Üí "ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏°ý∏µý∏™ý∏¥ý∏óý∏òý∏¥ýπåý∏¢ý∏∑ý∏ôý∏¢ý∏±ý∏ôý∏£ý∏≤ý∏¢ý∏Åý∏≤ý∏£ý∏ôý∏µýπâ" and 22023 (already confirmed / unknown) ‚Üí a friendly message, `revalidatePath('/portal')`. **No DB / migration / guards / nav** (the `portal` component folder + the route already registered). **Test (written first, RED proven):** `portal-receipts.test.tsx` (lists pending items, empty state, the `confirmStockIssue` call shape on ýπÑý∏îýπâý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÅý∏•ýπâý∏ß). **Browser pass = operator on-device** (the worker portal needs a portal-bound worker login). **CUSTODY HANDSHAKE COMPLETE end-to-end:** U6 engine ‚Üí U7 issuer names a receiver + status badge ‚Üí U8 receiver confirms on the portal. An unconfirmed issue stays `ý∏£ý∏≠ý∏£ý∏±ý∏ö` = the audit flag ("who holds it"). **Out of scope (flagged):** the /store-manager receiver picker; a manager confirm-on-behalf override (when a worker has no portal login); wiring issue cost into `wp_profit` (cost-attribution, deferred with the margin layer); equipment round-trip; reversals; stock count/variance. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** stock count / variance (physical count vs on-hand ‚Üí shrinkage adjustment), then reversals.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U9: stock count / variance (shrinkage) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U9 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 216 files / 1426** (DB-only ‚Äî no unit delta) ¬∑ **db:test 133 files / 2502 / 0** (file 184, 19 asserts) ¬∑ `pnpm build` green; db:push applied `20260809000400`; db:types regenerated. The self-governance shrinkage mechanism: a physical count reconciles on-hand to reality, and the variance valued at cost is the store-BU P&L hit. **Design (spec 177 ¬ßU9, DB-only; the count UI is U10):** `stock_counts` (append-only physical-count events: project_id, catalog_item_id, **system_qty snapshot**, counted_qty‚â•0, **unit + unit_cost snapshot** (the moving-avg at count), **GENERATED `variance` = counted ‚àí system** and **`variance_value` = (counted ‚àí system) √ó unit_cost** ‚Äî both generated from plain columns only, no generated-from-generated chain; note, counted_by ‚Äî no UPDATE/DELETE policy; a wrong count is corrected by a fresh count). **RPC `record_stock_count(project, item, counted_qty, note default null)`** SECURITY DEFINER: role gate = **SITE_STAFF_ROLES** (site_admin keeps the physical store + the PM tier ‚Äî NOT procurement) + `can_see_project`; `counted_qty >= 0` (22023); **locks the on-hand row ‚Äî counting is limited to items the store already tracks** (no on-hand row ‚Üí 22023 "not stocked"; cataloguing found-untracked stock is a ý∏£ý∏±ý∏öýπÄý∏Çýπâý∏≤, not a count); snapshots the unit (even a DEACTIVATED-but-still-on-hand item counts), computes `avg = round(value/qty, 2)` (the unchanged cost basis ‚Äî a count adjusts QUANTITY not unit cost), logs the count, and **reconciles on-hand to the counted truth** (`qty_on_hand = counted`, `total_value = round(counted √ó avg, 2)`). **READ:** `stock_counts` SELECT = `can_see_project OR procurement` (the wrapped `(select current_user_role())` from the start). **Migration `20260809000400`, pgTAP `184`** (structure + anon-deny; count DOWN 100‚Üí90 ‚Üí on-hand 90/value 900, variance ‚àí10 / variance_value ‚àí100 / system_qty 100; count UP 90‚Üí95; count to ZERO ‚Üí value 0; unstocked-item + negative-qty 22023; non-member + visitor 42501; member reads the count history). **Clean first push ‚Äî no traps** (the prior units' lessons held: policy wrapped, fixtures complete, plan count correct). **Out of scope (flagged):** **U10 = the count UI** (a ý∏ïý∏£ý∏ßý∏àý∏ôý∏±ý∏ö action per on-hand row on /store ‚Üí counted-qty form ‚Üí `record_stock_count`, showing the variance); reversals of receipt/issue; found-untracked-stock costing; wiring issue cost into `wp_profit`; the late margin layer. **NEXT (Phase 3 cont.):** U10 ‚Äî the count UI (ý∏ïý∏£ý∏ßý∏àý∏ôý∏±ý∏ö on /store), then reversals.

## Spec 177 ‚Äî Store + Stock-In, U10: the count UI (ý∏ïý∏£ý∏ßý∏àý∏ôý∏±ý∏ö on /store) (2026-06-22)

Status: **U10 SHIPPED to prod ‚Äî 2026-06-22.** lint ¬∑ typecheck ¬∑ **vitest 216 files / 1430 (+4: store-manager count)** ¬∑ `pnpm build` green. **No DB change** (reuses the U9 `record_stock_count` RPC) ‚Üí no migration, no db:test delta.
